  applied_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Amount of payment applied to the invoice after deductions and adjustments. Net amount reducing accounts receivable balance.']
  bank_reference_number varchar [note: 'Bank transaction reference or confirmation number. Used for bank statement reconciliation and audit trail.']
  business_area_code varchar [note: 'Business area or division code for segment reporting. Used for internal management reporting and EBITDA analysis by business unit.']
  check_number varchar [note: 'Check number when payment method is check. Used for check reconciliation and fraud prevention.']
  clearing_date date
  clearing_document_number varchar [note: 'SAP clearing document number generated when payment is applied to open invoice. Used for financial reconciliation and audit.']
  company_code varchar [note: 'SAP company code representing the legal entity receiving the payment. Used for multi-entity financial consolidation.']
  cost_center_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cost center code for payment allocation. Used when payment processing costs need to be tracked by organizational unit.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'User ID of the person or system that created the payment record. Used for SOX compliance and audit trail.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage.']
  currency_code varchar
  days_to_pay varchar [note: 'Number of days between invoice date and payment date. Key metric for Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) calculation and customer payment behavior analysis.']
  deduction_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount of deductions taken by customer from the payment. Includes trade promotions, allowances, damages, and short payments.']
  deduction_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes explaining the deduction or short payment. Captures customer explanation and internal investigation details.']
  deduction_reason_code varchar [note: 'Reason code for customer deduction. Used for deduction management, dispute resolution, and root cause analysis. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: trade_promotion|pricing_dispute|quantity_shortage|damaged_goods|quality_issue|freight_claim|administrative_error|unauthorized — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cash discount or early payment discount amount taken by customer. Typically based on payment terms (e.g., 2/10 net 30).']
  discount_taken_amount decimal(18,2)
  due_date date [note: 'Original invoice due date. Used to determine if payment is on-time, early, or late for DSO and aging analysis.']
  edi_transaction_set_reference varchar [note: 'EDI 820 transaction set control number when payment received via EDI. Used for EDI reconciliation and compliance.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Exchange rate applied to convert payment currency to local currency. Used when payment currency differs from invoice or local currency.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (month) when payment was posted. Used for monthly financial close and period-based reporting.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year when payment was posted. Used for period-based financial reporting and year-over-year analysis.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp
  local_currency_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Payment amount converted to company local currency using the exchange rate. Used for consolidated financial reporting.']
  local_currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter code for the company local currency. Used for financial reporting and consolidation.']
  lockbox_batch_number varchar [note: 'Lockbox batch identifier when payment received through bank lockbox service. Used for lockbox reconciliation.']
  modified_by_user varchar [note: 'User ID of the person or system that last modified the payment record. Used for SOX compliance and audit trail.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment record was last modified. Used for audit trail and change tracking.']
  overpayment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether payment amount exceeds the invoice balance. True if customer paid more than owed.']
  partial_payment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is a partial payment against the invoice. True if payment amount is less than invoice balance.']
  payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount received in the payment transaction, in the payment currency. Gross payment before any deductions or adjustments.']
  payment_channel decimal(18,2) [note: 'Channel through which payment was received. Distinguishes interface from payment instrument.']
  payment_currency_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the payment amount. Identifies the currency in which payment was received.']
  payment_date date [note: 'Date when the payment was received or posted. Used for Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) calculation and cash flow analysis.']
  payment_document_number decimal(18,2) [note: 'External payment document number or reference provided by the customer or payment processor. Used for reconciliation and audit trail.']
  payment_method decimal(18,2) [note: 'Method or instrument used for payment. Includes ACH (Automated Clearing House), wire transfer, check, credit card, debit card, or EFT.']
  payment_number varchar
  payment_processor_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Transaction identifier from third-party payment processor (e.g., Stripe, PayPal, Adyen). Used for processor reconciliation.']
  payment_status decimal(18,2) [note: 'Current status of the payment in the cash application workflow. Tracks payment lifecycle from receipt through clearing. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: received|cleared|applied|partially_applied|unapplied|reversed|rejected — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  payment_terms_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Payment terms code from the original invoice (e.g., NET30, 2/10NET30). Used to validate discount eligibility and calculate DSO.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date when the payment was posted to the general ledger. Used for financial period assignment and reporting.']
  reference_number varchar
  remittance_advice_number varchar [note: 'Reference number from customer remittance advice document. Links payment to customer payment notification (EDI 820 or paper remittance).']
  remittance_advice_sent varchar
  reversal_date date [note: 'Date when payment was reversed. Null if payment has not been reversed.']
  reversal_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this payment has been reversed. True if payment was subsequently voided or returned.']
  reversal_reason_code varchar [note: 'Reason code for payment reversal. Includes NSF (non-sufficient funds), stop payment, duplicate, fraud, customer request, or system error. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: NSF|stop_payment|duplicate|fraud|customer_request|bank_error|system_error — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  short_payment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether customer paid less than invoice amount without authorized deduction. Triggers deduction management workflow.']
  source_system_code varchar
  value_date date [note: 'Date when funds become available in the bank account. May differ from payment date due to clearing time.']

  Note: 'Accounts receivable payment record capturing cash receipts from trade customers against outstanding AR invoices. Records payment date, payment method (ACH, wire, check, EDI 820), amount received, currency, exchange rate, bank account, clearing document reference, partial payment flag, and deduction/short-payment details. Supports cash application, deduction management, and DSO calculation. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA FI-AR and Oracle Cloud Receivables.'
}

Table finance.ap_invoice {
  ap_invoice_id decimal(18,2) [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the accounts payable invoice record. Primary key for the AP invoice entity.']
  bank_account_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the company bank account from which payment was or will be made. Used for cash management and bank reconciliation.']
  company_code_id varchar
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: AP invoices capture GL account code; FK to gl_account creates a true parent‑child relationship and removes the code column.']
  goods_receipt_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the goods receipt document used in three-way match verification to confirm materials or services were received.']
  journal_entry_id varchar
  payment_run_id decimal(18,2) [note: 'Identifier for the automated payment run batch that processed this invoice payment. Used for payment reconciliation and audit trails.']
  purchase_order_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the purchase order against which this invoice is matched. Used for three-way match verification.']
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the vendor or supplier who issued this invoice. Links to the vendor master record.']
  supplier_invoice_id varchar
  baseline_date date [note: 'The reference date from which payment terms are calculated. Typically the invoice date or goods receipt date depending on payment term configuration.']
  clearing_document_number varchar [note: 'The financial document number that cleared the open payable balance. Links the invoice to the payment transaction for reconciliation.']
  company_code varchar [note: 'Four-character code identifying the legal entity or company within the enterprise for which this invoice is recorded. Used for financial consolidation and reporting.']
  cost_center_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'The cost center to which the invoice expense is allocated. Used for management accounting and departmental cost tracking.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'The user ID of the person who created the invoice record. Required for SOX-compliant audit trails and segregation of duties verification.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when the invoice record was first created in the system. Used for audit trails and Sarbanes-Oxley (SOX) compliance.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code indicating the currency in which the invoice is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The cash discount amount available if payment is made within the early payment discount period. Used for working capital optimization.']
  due_date date [note: 'The date by which payment must be made to the vendor according to the payment terms. Used for cash flow planning and Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) tracking.']
  early_payment_discount_taken decimal(18,2) [note: 'The actual cash discount amount captured by paying the invoice within the early payment discount period. Key metric for working capital optimization.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,5) [note: 'The foreign exchange rate used to convert the invoice amount to the company\'s local currency for financial reporting.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'The fiscal period (month) within the fiscal year in which the invoice was posted. Used for monthly financial reporting.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'The fiscal year in which the invoice was posted. Used for period-based financial reporting and year-end closing.']
  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total invoice amount before any deductions, including all line items, taxes, and freight charges.']
  invoice_category decimal(18,2) [note: 'Classification of the invoice by spend category (e.g., raw materials, packaging, contract manufacturing, indirect goods, services). Used for spend analytics and procurement reporting. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: raw_materials|packaging|contract_manufacturing|indirect_goods|services|freight|utilities|rent — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  invoice_date date [note: 'The date the vendor issued the invoice. This is the document date from the vendor\'s invoice and is used for aging analysis.']
  invoice_description decimal(18,2) [note: 'Free-text description or header text providing additional context about the invoice, such as the nature of goods or services purchased.']
  invoice_number varchar
  invoice_status decimal(18,2) [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the invoice in the accounts payable process. Tracks the invoice from receipt through payment and clearing. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|posted|approved|paid|partially_paid|cancelled|on_hold — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  invoice_type varchar
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp
  match_status varchar [note: 'Status of the three-way match verification process comparing the invoice to the purchase order and goods receipt. Critical for payment approval workflow.']
  modified_by_user varchar [note: 'The user ID of the person who last modified the invoice record. Required for SOX-compliant audit trails.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when the invoice record was last modified. Used for change tracking and audit compliance.']
  net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The net payable amount after deducting any discounts or credits. This is the amount that will be paid to the vendor.']
  outstanding_amount decimal(18,2)
  paid_amount decimal(18,2)
  payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The actual amount paid to the vendor. May differ from net amount if partial payments or adjustments were made.']
  payment_block_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Code indicating if the invoice is blocked for payment and the reason for the block (e.g., price variance, quantity variance, quality issue, pending approval).']
  payment_block_flag boolean
  payment_block_reason varchar
  payment_date date [note: 'The actual date payment was executed to the vendor. Used for cash flow tracking and Days Inventory Outstanding (DIO) calculation.']
  payment_method decimal(18,2) [note: 'The method by which payment will be or was made to the vendor (e.g., wire transfer, ACH, check, EFT, credit card, virtual card).']
  payment_terms varchar
  payment_terms_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Code representing the payment terms agreed with the vendor (e.g., Net 30, 2/10 Net 30). Defines the due date calculation and early payment discount eligibility.']
  posting_date date [note: 'The date the invoice was posted to the general ledger. This date determines the fiscal period for financial reporting.']
  profit_center_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'The profit center to which the invoice is allocated for segment reporting and EBITDA calculation by business unit.']
  reference_document_number varchar [note: 'Additional reference number for cross-referencing to other documents such as delivery notes, packing slips, or contract numbers.']
  source_system_code varchar
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total tax amount charged on the invoice, including sales tax, VAT, GST, or other applicable taxes.']
  tax_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'The tax jurisdiction code or tax type applied to the invoice (e.g., sales tax, VAT, GST). Used for tax reporting and compliance.']
  three_way_match_flag boolean
  vendor_bank_account_code varchar [note: 'Reference to the vendor\'s bank account to which payment was or will be sent. Required for electronic payment processing.']
  vendor_invoice_number decimal(18,2) [note: 'The invoice number assigned by the vendor. This is the external reference number printed on the vendor\'s invoice document.']
  withholding_tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The amount of withholding tax deducted from the payment to the vendor as required by tax regulations. Must be remitted to tax authorities.']

  Note: 'Accounts payable master record representing the full trade payable lifecycle for raw materials, packaging, contract manufacturing, and indirect goods/services. Owns invoice receipt, three-way match verification, payment scheduling, payment execution, early payment discount capture, and clearing. Captures vendor invoice number, invoice date, posting date, due date, gross amount, tax, net amount, payment terms, currency, match status, payment method, payment date, payment amount, payment run ID, bank account reference, early discount taken, clearing document, and payment block details. The single source of truth for all payable balances, payment execution, DIO tracking, working capital optimization, and supplier payment management. Integrates with SAP S/4HANA MM-IV, FI-AP, and Oracle Cloud Payables.'
}

Table finance.ap_payment {
  ap_payment_id decimal(18,2) [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the accounts payable payment record. Primary key.']
  ap_invoice_id decimal(18,2)
  bank_account_id varchar
  company_code_id varchar
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: AP payments include GL account code; FK to gl_account provides proper accounting linkage.']
  invoice_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the invoice being paid. Links to the accounts payable invoice record.']
  payment_run_id decimal(18,2)
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the supplier receiving the payment. Links to the supplier master data.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'User ID or name of the person who approved the payment. Supports SOX-compliant audit trails and segregation of duties controls.']
  approved_date date [note: 'The date on which the payment was approved. Supports audit trails and payment cycle time analysis.']
  bank_reference_number varchar
  check_number varchar
  clearing_date date [note: 'The date on which the payment cleared the open invoice in the accounts payable subledger. Used for Days Inventory Outstanding (DIO) and working capital analysis.']
  clearing_document_number varchar [note: 'The document number assigned when the payment cleared the open invoice in the accounts payable subledger. Used for reconciliation and audit trails.']
  company_code varchar [note: 'The company code (legal entity) that issued the payment. Used for multi-entity financial consolidation and reporting.']
  cost_center_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'The cost center code to which the payment expense was allocated. Used for management accounting and profitability analysis.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when the payment record was first created in the system. Supports audit trails and data lineage tracking.']
  currency_code varchar
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The early payment discount amount taken by the company for paying the invoice before the discount deadline. Supports working capital optimization and supplier relationship management.']
  discount_due_date date [note: 'The date by which the payment must be made to qualify for the early payment discount. Used for working capital optimization decisions.']
  discount_taken_amount decimal(18,2)
  due_date date [note: 'The date by which the payment was contractually due to the supplier. Used to calculate on-time payment performance and avoid late payment penalties.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'The exchange rate applied to convert the payment amount from the payment currency to the company\'s local currency. Used for financial consolidation and reporting.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp
  local_currency_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The payment amount converted to the company\'s local reporting currency using the exchange rate. Used for consolidated financial reporting and EBITDA calculations.']
  local_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the company\'s local reporting currency (e.g., USD). Used for financial consolidation.']
  modified_by varchar [note: 'User ID or name of the person who last modified the payment record. Supports SOX-compliant audit trails and change tracking.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when the payment record was last modified. Supports audit trails and change tracking for SOX compliance.']
  net_payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The net payment amount after applying early payment discounts and any other adjustments. This is the actual amount transferred to the supplier.']
  payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The gross payment amount remitted to the supplier in the payment currency, before any adjustments or discounts.']
  payment_approval_status decimal(18,2) [note: 'Approval status of the payment. Pending indicates awaiting approval, approved indicates authorized for processing, rejected indicates payment was denied. Supports SOX-compliant approval workflows.']
  payment_block_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Code indicating if the payment was blocked for review or approval. Blank indicates no block. Used for payment control and fraud prevention.']
  payment_block_reason decimal(18,2) [note: 'Description of the reason the payment was blocked (e.g., pending invoice verification, supplier on hold, duplicate payment suspected). Used for exception management.']
  payment_block_released_by decimal(18,2) [note: 'User ID or name of the person who released the payment block and authorized the payment to proceed. Supports SOX-compliant audit trails.']
  payment_block_released_date date [note: 'The date on which the payment block was released and the payment was authorized to proceed. Supports audit trails and payment cycle time analysis.']
  payment_currency_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the payment amount (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Supports multi-currency payment processing.']
  payment_date date [note: 'The date on which the payment was issued or processed. Used for cash flow reporting and Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) calculations.']
  payment_document_number decimal(18,2) [note: 'The externally-known payment document number assigned by the ERP system. Used for reconciliation and audit trails.']
  payment_method decimal(18,2) [note: 'The payment instrument used to remit funds to the supplier. ACH (Automated Clearing House), wire transfer, check, EDI 820 (Electronic Data Interchange payment order), credit card, or direct debit.']
  payment_notes decimal(18,2) [note: 'Free-text notes or comments about the payment. Used to capture special instructions, exceptions, or additional context for audit and reconciliation purposes.']
  payment_number varchar
  payment_reference_number decimal(18,2) [note: 'External reference number provided to the supplier for payment identification and reconciliation (e.g., check number, wire confirmation number, ACH trace number).']
  payment_status decimal(18,2) [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the payment. Draft indicates initial creation, pending awaits approval, approved is ready for processing, processed has been sent to bank, cleared has been confirmed by bank, failed indicates processing error, cancelled indicates payment was voided. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|pending|approved|processed|cleared|failed|cancelled — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  payment_terms decimal(18,2) [note: 'The payment terms agreed with the supplier (e.g., Net 30, 2/10 Net 30). Defines the due date and early payment discount eligibility.']
  posting_date date
  profit_center_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'The profit center code to which the payment expense was allocated. Used for segment reporting and EBITDA analysis.']
  remittance_advice_sent varchar
  remittance_advice_sent_date date [note: 'The date on which the remittance advice was sent to the supplier. Used for supplier communication tracking.']
  remittance_advice_sent_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether a remittance advice was sent to the supplier to notify them of the payment details. True indicates sent, False indicates not sent.']
  source_system_code varchar
  created_by varchar [note: 'User ID or name of the person who created the payment record. Supports SOX-compliant audit trails.']

  Note: 'Accounts payable payment record capturing outgoing payments to suppliers for raw materials, packaging, and services. Records payment date, payment method (ACH, wire, check, EDI 820), payment amount, currency, exchange rate, bank account, payment run ID, clearing document, early payment discount taken, and payment block release authorization. Supports cash flow management, supplier relationship management, and working capital optimization. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA FI-AP.'
}

Table finance.cogs_allocation {
  cogs_allocation_id decimal(18,2) [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the COGS allocation record. Primary key for the product costing and COGS allocation master.']
  cost_center_id decimal(18,2) [note: 'Reference to the cost center responsible for the production activity. Enables cost center profitability analysis.']
  gl_account_id varchar
  journal_entry_id varchar
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the manufacturing plant where the product is produced and costed.']
  product_bom_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the bill of materials used for this cost calculation. Links cost to recipe/formula structure.']
  production_order_id varchar
  profit_center_id decimal(18,2) [note: 'Reference to the profit center for internal P&L reporting and segment profitability analysis.']
  routing_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the production routing (sequence of operations) used for this cost calculation. Links cost to manufacturing process.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the material (finished good, semi-finished good, or raw material) for which COGS is allocated.']
  allocated_amount decimal(18,2)
  allocation_basis varchar
  allocation_date date [note: 'Date when the COGS allocation was calculated and posted. Key business event timestamp for cost assignment.']
  allocation_method decimal(18,2) [note: 'Method used to allocate costs to the product: direct (traced), activity_based (ABC costing), weighted_average, FIFO (first-in-first-out), or standard (predetermined rate).']
  allocation_period varchar
  approved_by varchar [note: 'User ID or name of the person who approved and released this cost estimate for use in inventory valuation and margin analysis.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this cost estimate was approved and released. Critical for SOX compliance and audit trail.']
  cost_per_unit varchar
  costing_lot_size decimal(18,3) [note: 'Quantity basis used for cost calculation. Fixed costs are spread over this lot size to determine unit cost.']
  costing_sheet decimal(18,2) [note: 'Template defining overhead calculation rules and cost component structure for this allocation.']
  costing_type decimal(18,2) [note: 'Type of cost estimate: standard (baseline for valuation), actual (realized costs), planned (budgeted), or simulated (what-if scenario).']
  costing_version decimal(18,2) [note: 'Version identifier for the costing run (e.g., standard cost, planned cost, actual cost). Enables parallel costing scenarios and version comparison.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this COGS allocation record was first created in the system. Audit trail for record creation.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all cost amounts (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  depreciation_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Allocated depreciation expense for production equipment and facilities used in manufacturing.']
  direct_labor_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cost component for direct production labor involved in manufacturing the product.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (month) within the fiscal year for the COGS allocation. Supports monthly cost tracking and variance analysis.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year for which the COGS allocation applies. Enables year-over-year cost trend analysis.']
  fixed_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Fixed manufacturing overhead costs that remain constant regardless of production volume (e.g., facility rent, salaries).']
  freight_in_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Inbound freight and logistics costs for raw materials and components. Part of landed cost calculation.']
  labor_cost_amount decimal(18,2)
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp
  lot_size_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the costing lot size (e.g., EA for each, KG for kilogram, L for liter).']
  machine_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cost component for machine and equipment usage, including depreciation, maintenance, and operating costs.']
  material_cost_amount decimal(18,2)
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this COGS allocation record was last modified. Audit trail for record updates.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes and comments regarding this cost allocation, including assumptions, adjustments, or special circumstances.']
  other_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Miscellaneous cost components not classified in standard categories (e.g., quality testing, rework, scrap).']
  overhead_cost_amount decimal(18,2)
  packaging_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cost component for primary, secondary, and tertiary packaging materials. Critical for CPG product costing.']
  price_control_indicator decimal(18,2) [note: 'Indicates whether material is valued at standard price (S) or moving average price (V). Critical for inventory valuation method.']
  quantity decimal(18,4)
  quantity_produced varchar
  quantity_uom varchar
  raw_material_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cost component for raw materials and ingredients used in production. Key driver of COGS in consumer goods manufacturing.']
  release_status varchar [note: 'Lifecycle status of the cost estimate: draft (in progress), released (approved for use), locked (frozen for audit), archived (historical).']
  source_system_code varchar
  total_cogs_amount decimal(18,2)
  total_cost_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total allocated cost per unit including all cost components (raw material, packaging, labor, overhead, freight, depreciation).']
  unit_cost decimal(18,4)
  validity_end_date date [note: 'End date until which this cost estimate remains valid. Null indicates open-ended validity.']
  validity_start_date date [note: 'Start date from which this cost estimate is valid and applicable for inventory valuation and margin calculation.']
  valuation_class varchar [note: 'Classification code that determines which general ledger accounts are updated during inventory movements and COGS posting.']
  variable_overhead_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Variable manufacturing overhead costs that fluctuate with production volume (e.g., utilities, indirect materials).']
  variance_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Difference between standard cost and actual cost. Positive indicates unfavorable variance (actual > standard), negative indicates favorable variance.']
  variance_category varchar [note: 'Classification of cost variance by root cause: price (input cost change), quantity (usage deviation), mix (recipe change), yield (output efficiency), efficiency (labor/machine productivity), volume (fixed cost absorption).']
  variance_type varchar

  Note: 'Product costing and COGS allocation master for CPG manufacturing. Owns both standard cost estimates (planned) and actual cost allocations for finished goods, semi-finished goods, and raw materials. Captures cost component splits (raw material, packaging, direct labor, variable/fixed overhead, machine overhead, freight-in, depreciation), costing version, validity period, costing lot size, release status, plant, allocation date, fiscal period, standard vs actual cost, variance amount, variance category, and allocation method. The single source of truth for inventory valuation, SKU-level and brand-level gross margin analysis, manufacturing variance reporting, COGS decomposition, and make-vs-buy cost comparison. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA CO-PC (Product Costing).'
}

Table finance.standard_cost {
  standard_cost_id decimal(18,2) [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the standard cost record. Primary key for the standard cost master data.']
  company_code_id varchar
  cost_center_id decimal(18,2) [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Standard cost records are defined per cost center; linking enables cost‑center level consolidation and provides a proper relational anchor.']
  gl_account_id varchar
  primary_standard_manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the manufacturing plant or production facility where this standard cost applies. Standard costs are plant-specific in CPG manufacturing.']
  primary_standard_sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the material (finished good, semi-finished good, or raw material) for which this standard cost is defined. Links to the product master.']
  profit_center_id decimal(18,2)
  standard_sku_id varchar
  approval_status varchar [note: 'The approval workflow status for this standard cost estimate. Ensures proper governance and SOX compliance for cost changes.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'The user ID or name of the manager or controller who approved this standard cost estimate. Required for SOX compliance and audit trail.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this standard cost estimate was approved. Critical for audit trail and SOX compliance.']
  base_quantity varchar
  base_uom varchar
  bom_usage varchar [note: 'The BOM usage type (e.g., production, costing, engineering) that was used as the basis for material cost calculation in this estimate.']
  cost_estimate_created_by decimal(18,2) [note: 'The user ID or name of the cost accountant or system user who created this cost estimate. Used for audit trail and accountability.']
  cost_estimate_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this standard cost record was first created in the source system. Critical for audit trail and SOX compliance.']
  cost_estimate_modified_by decimal(18,2) [note: 'The user ID or name of the cost accountant or system user who last modified this cost estimate. Used for audit trail and change tracking.']
  cost_estimate_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this standard cost record was last modified in the source system. Critical for audit trail and SOX compliance.']
  cost_estimate_number decimal(18,2) [note: 'The unique business identifier for the cost estimate document in the source ERP system. Used for audit trail and traceability.']
  cost_variance_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'The absolute difference between the current standard cost and the previous standard cost. Positive indicates cost increase, negative indicates cost decrease.']
  cost_variance_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage change in standard cost compared to the previous period. Calculated as (current - previous) / previous * 100.']
  costing_lot_size decimal(18,3) [note: 'The production lot size (quantity) used as the basis for calculating the standard cost. Fixed costs are spread over this quantity.']
  costing_lot_size_uom decimal(18,2) [note: 'The unit of measure for the costing lot size (e.g., EA, KG, L, CS). Must align with the materials base unit of measure.']
  costing_run_number varchar
  costing_sheet decimal(18,2) [note: 'The costing sheet identifier that defines the overhead calculation rules and surcharge rates applied in this cost estimate.']
  costing_status varchar
  costing_type decimal(18,2) [note: 'The type of cost estimate: standard (for inventory valuation), planned (for budgeting), actual (for variance analysis), or simulated (for what-if scenarios).']
  costing_variant varchar
  costing_version decimal(18,2) [note: 'The costing version identifier that groups standard cost estimates for a specific planning or valuation scenario (e.g., current year, budget, simulation). Enables parallel costing scenarios.']
  created_timestamp timestamp
  currency_code varchar [note: 'The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code in which the standard cost is expressed (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  direct_labor_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The cost component for direct production labor (machine operators, line workers) allocated to one unit based on standard labor hours and rates.']
  fiscal_period varchar [note: 'The fiscal period (month) within the fiscal year for which this standard cost estimate is applicable. Enables period-specific cost tracking.']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'The fiscal year for which this standard cost estimate is applicable. Standard costs are typically set annually and used for budgeting and variance analysis.']
  fixed_overhead_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The cost component for fixed manufacturing overhead (plant management, utilities, rent) allocated to one unit based on the costing lot size.']
  freight_in_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The cost component for inbound freight and logistics to bring raw materials and packaging to the plant, allocated to one unit.']
  labor_cost decimal(18,4)
  labor_cost_per_unit varchar
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp
  machine_overhead_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The cost component for machine and equipment overhead (depreciation, maintenance, energy) allocated to one unit based on machine hours.']
  marked_flag boolean
  material_cost decimal(18,4)
  material_cost_per_unit varchar
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments about this standard cost estimate, such as assumptions, special considerations, or reasons for cost changes.']
  other_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The cost component for miscellaneous or other costs not classified in the primary categories (e.g., scrap, rework, special charges).']
  overhead_cost decimal(18,4)
  overhead_cost_per_unit varchar
  packaging_material_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The cost component for packaging materials (primary, secondary, tertiary) used for one unit. Critical for CPG cost structure analysis.']
  plant_code varchar
  previous_standard_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The total standard cost from the prior costing period or version. Used for variance analysis and cost trend reporting.']
  raw_material_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The cost component for raw materials consumed in the production of one unit. Key input for COGS and margin analysis.']
  release_date date [note: 'The date when this standard cost estimate was officially released and became active for inventory valuation and COGS calculation.']
  release_status varchar [note: 'The lifecycle status of the standard cost record: draft (under development), released (active for valuation), locked (frozen for audit), or archived (historical).']
  released_flag boolean
  routing_usage varchar [note: 'The routing usage type (e.g., production, costing) that was used as the basis for labor and machine cost calculation in this estimate.']
  source_system_code varchar
  total_standard_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The total standard cost per unit of the material, summing all cost components (raw material, packaging, labor, overhead, freight). This is the authoritative cost for inventory valuation and COGS.']
  total_standard_cost_per_unit varchar
  valid_from_date date [note: 'The start date from which this standard cost estimate is effective. Used for time-dependent cost valuation and COGS calculation.']
  valid_to_date date [note: 'The end date until which this standard cost estimate is effective. Nullable for open-ended validity.']
  valuation_variant varchar [note: 'The valuation variant that defines the costing methodology and cost component structure used for this estimate (e.g., full costing, marginal costing).']
  variable_overhead_cost decimal(18,4) [note: 'The cost component for variable manufacturing overhead (indirect materials, supplies, variable utilities) allocated to one unit.']

  Note: 'Standard cost master record for finished goods, semi-finished goods, and raw materials used in CPG manufacturing. Stores the cost estimate per SKU/material including cost component split (raw material, packaging, direct labor, machine overhead, fixed overhead, freight-in), costing version, validity period, plant, costing lot size, and release status. The authoritative source for inventory valuation, COGS calculation, and manufacturing variance analysis. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA CO-PC.'
}

Table finance.finance_budget {
  finance_budget_id decimal(18,2) [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the finance budget record. Primary key for the finance budget entity.']
  company_code_id varchar
  cost_center_id decimal(18,2) [note: 'Reference to the cost center to which this budget is allocated. Links budget planning to organizational cost structure.']

  finance_approved_by_employee_id varchar
  gl_account_id varchar
  owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'FK to workforce.employee']
  primary_finance_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the individual or role responsible for managing and justifying this budget line. Supports accountability and budget governance.']

  budget_amount decimal(18,2)
  budget_category decimal(18,2) [note: 'High-level categorization of the budget type such as operating expense (OPEX), capital expenditure (CAPEX), headcount, revenue, cost of goods sold (COGS), marketing, or research and development (R&D). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: opex|capex|headcount|revenue|cogs|marketing|r_and_d — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  budget_code varchar
  budget_name varchar
  budget_status varchar
