  proper_shipping_name varchar [note: 'Official shipping name for transport documentation as specified by UN/DOT regulations.']
  regulatory_information varchar [note: 'Applicable regulatory requirements including TSCA status, REACH registration, California Prop 65, SARA Title III, and other jurisdiction-specific regulations.']
  revision_date date [note: 'Revision date']
  sds_number varchar [note: 'SDS identifier']
  sds_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the SDS document within the regulatory document management system.']
  signal_word varchar [note: 'Signal word (Danger, Warning)']
  stability varchar [note: 'Chemical stability information and conditions to avoid that may cause instability or hazardous reactions.']
  storage_conditions varchar [note: 'Conditions for safe storage including temperature, humidity, ventilation requirements, and incompatible materials.']
  toxicological_information varchar [note: 'Comprehensive toxicology data including acute toxicity, skin corrosion/irritation, eye damage/irritation, sensitization, mutagenicity, carcinogenicity, reproductive toxicity, and target organ effects.']
  transport_hazard_class varchar [note: 'UN/DOT hazard class for transportation (e.g., Class 3 Flammable Liquids, Class 8 Corrosives).']
  un_number varchar [note: 'Four-digit UN identification number for hazardous materials transport classification.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for this SDS revision, tracking document evolution over time.']

  Note: 'Safety Data Sheets for products and ingredients'
}

Table regulatory.ingredient_list {
  ingredient_list_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  approved_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Approver']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Jurisdiction']
  product_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Formulation']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  allergen_declaration varchar
  allergen_declaration_text varchar [note: 'Allergen declaration']
  allergen_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ingredient is a known allergen requiring special labeling or disclosure per regulatory requirements (e.g., EU Cosmetics Regulation Annex III).']
  allergen_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the allergen type if allergen_flag is true. Used for consumer safety labeling and regulatory compliance.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Approval date']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the regulatory affairs professional who approved this ingredient declaration for use.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this ingredient declaration was approved by regulatory affairs.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'Unique CAS (Chemical Abstracts Service) registry number identifying the chemical substance. Used for regulatory submissions and safety documentation.']
  common_name varchar [note: 'Common or trade name of the ingredient used for internal reference and non-regulated communications.']
  concentration_max_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum concentration of the ingredient in the finished product, expressed as a percentage by weight. Used for regulatory submissions and formulation specifications.']
  concentration_min_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum concentration of the ingredient in the finished product, expressed as a percentage by weight. Used for regulatory submissions and formulation specifications.']
  concentration_typical_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Typical or target concentration of the ingredient in the finished product, expressed as a percentage by weight. Used for quality control and manufacturing guidance.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  declaration_name_override decimal(9,4) [note: 'Alternative name to be used on the product label if different from INCI name, as permitted by jurisdiction-specific regulations (e.g., trade name, common name).']
  declaration_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ingredient must be declared on the product label per regulatory requirements. Some processing aids or trace contaminants may be exempt.']
  declaration_status decimal(9,4) [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the ingredient declaration record in the regulatory documentation workflow.']
  descending_order_flag boolean [note: 'Descending order flag']
  effective_date date [note: 'Effective date']
  einecs_number varchar [note: 'EINECS (European Inventory of Existing Commercial Chemical Substances) number for substances marketed in the EU before September 1981. Required for EU REACH compliance.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which this ingredient declaration is no longer valid, typically due to formulation changes or regulatory updates. Null indicates no expiration.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Expiry date']
  fda_status varchar [note: 'FDA (Food and Drug Administration) regulatory status of the ingredient for use in consumer goods (e.g., GRAS - Generally Recognized As Safe, approved food additive, approved color additive).']
  ifra_amendment_number varchar [note: 'IFRA (International Fragrance Association) amendment number that governs the use restrictions for this ingredient if IFRA restricted.']
  ifra_restricted_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ingredient is subject to IFRA (International Fragrance Association) restrictions or standards for use in fragrance compounds.']
  inci_declaration varchar
  inci_name varchar [note: 'Standardized INCI (International Nomenclature of Cosmetic Ingredients) name for the ingredient as required for cosmetic product labeling. Mandatory for cosmetics and personal care products.']
  ingredient_declaration_text varchar [note: 'Full declaration text']
  ingredient_function varchar [note: 'Primary functional role of the ingredient in the formulation (e.g., preservative, surfactant, fragrance, colorant, active ingredient). Used for regulatory classification and formulation analysis. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: preservative|surfactant|emollient|humectant|emulsifier|thickener|fragrance|colorant|active_ingredient|solvent|ph_adjuster|antioxidant|chelating_agent|opacifier|film_former — 15 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  ingredient_sequence varchar [note: 'Order in which this ingredient appears on the product label declaration. Typically sorted by descending concentration per regulatory requirements (FDA 21 CFR, EU Cosmetics Regulation).']
  language_code varchar [note: 'Language']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  list_type varchar [note: 'Type (INCI, common name)']
  list_version varchar [note: 'Version']
  market_country_code varchar
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this ingredient declaration record was last modified in the data platform.']
  nanomaterial_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is in nanomaterial form, requiring special labeling per EU Cosmetics Regulation (nano) designation.']
  natural_origin_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is derived from natural sources (plant, mineral, animal) as opposed to synthetic or petrochemical sources. Used for natural product claims and marketing.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  organic_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is certified organic by a recognized certification body (e.g., USDA Organic, COSMOS, ECOCERT). Used for organic product claims.']
  palm_oil_derivative_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is derived from palm oil. Used for sustainable sourcing tracking and RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil) compliance.']
  reach_registration_number decimal(9,4) [note: 'REACH (Registration Evaluation Authorization and Restriction of Chemicals) registration number for substances manufactured or imported in the EU in quantities of 1 tonne or more per year.']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Framework (FDA, EU)']
  restricted_substance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ingredient is subject to regulatory restrictions, concentration limits, or prohibited use conditions in certain jurisdictions.']
  restriction_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of jurisdictions or regulatory bodies where restrictions apply (e.g., EU, USA, CAN, JPN). Used for multi-jurisdictional compliance management.']
  restriction_type varchar [note: 'Type of regulatory restriction applied to this ingredient if restricted_substance_flag is true. Defines the nature of the regulatory control.']
  rspo_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether palm-derived ingredients are RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil) certified for sustainable sourcing.']
  sds_reference_number varchar [note: 'Reference number linking this ingredient to its Safety Data Sheet (SDS) or Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) document for hazard communication and workplace safety.']
  source_record_reference varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of this record in the source system, used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  vegan_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ingredient is free from animal-derived substances and suitable for vegan product claims.']

  Note: 'Ingredient lists for regulatory labeling'
}

Table regulatory.label_version {
  label_version_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Jurisdiction']
  label_approval_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Label approvals are signed off by a regulatory employee; FK records who approved each label version.']
  label_approved_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Approver']
  label_spec_id varchar [note: 'Label spec']
  previous_version_label_version_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the immediately preceding label version that this version supersedes, enabling version lineage tracking.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  allergen_declarations decimal(9,4) [note: 'Allergen declarations required on the label (e.g., \'Contains: milk, soy, tree nuts\'). Applicable for food and cosmetic products.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Approval date']
  approval_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory approval expires and the label version can no longer be used, if applicable.']
  approval_reference_number varchar [note: 'Official reference or registration number assigned by the regulatory authority for this label approval.']
  approval_status varchar
  approving_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory body or authority that approved this label version (e.g., FDA, EPA, EU Commission, Health Canada).']
  artwork_checksum varchar [note: 'SHA-256 checksum hash of the artwork file to ensure file integrity and detect unauthorized modifications.']
  artwork_file_name varchar [note: 'File name of the approved label artwork file (e.g., PDF, AI, or other format) stored in the document management system.']
  artwork_file_reference varchar [note: 'Artwork reference']
  barcode_type varchar [note: 'Type of barcode symbology printed on the label (e.g., UPC, EAN-13, GTIN-14, QR Code, DataMatrix).']
  barcode_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'The encoded value of the barcode printed on this label version (e.g., UPC number, GTIN, serialized data).']
  brand_name varchar [note: 'Brand name displayed on the label.']
  certification_marks varchar [note: 'Third-party certification marks and compliance logos displayed on the label (e.g., \'USDA Organic\', \'Leaping Bunny\', \'Non-GMO Project\', \'Kosher\', \'Halal\').']
  change_reason varchar [note: 'Business reason for creating this new label version (e.g., \'Regulatory requirement change\', \'Ingredient reformulation\', \'Packaging redesign\', \'Correction of error\').']
  claim_text varchar [note: 'Claims on label']
  contact_information varchar [note: 'Consumer contact information displayed on the label (phone number, website, email) for inquiries and customer service.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Country']
  country_of_origin varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code indicating where the product was manufactured or produced, as declared on the label.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  distributor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the distributor or importer as declared on the label, if different from manufacturer.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Effective date']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when this label version is no longer valid for new production. Nullable for currently active versions.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date from which this label version becomes effective and can be used in production and distribution.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Expiry date']
  expiry_date_format varchar [note: 'Format specification for how the expiry or best-before date will be printed on the label (e.g., \'MM/YYYY\', \'DD-MMM-YYYY\', \'EXP: YYYY-MM-DD\').']
  ingredient_declaration varchar [note: 'Ingredient list']
  ingredient_list varchar [note: 'Full ingredient list as declared on the label in descending order of predominance, following regulatory naming conventions (INCI for cosmetics, common names for food).']
  is_current_version boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this is the currently active label version for the SKU in the specified market. True if current, False if historical.']
  label_claims varchar [note: 'Marketing claims and statements appearing on the label (e.g., \'organic\', \'hypoallergenic\', \'dermatologist tested\', \'cruelty-free\'). Pipe-separated list if multiple.']
  label_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the label type: primary (consumer-facing package), secondary (outer carton), shipper (distribution box), pallet (logistics unit), promotional (limited edition), or sample (trial size).']
  language_code varchar [note: 'Language']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or name of the person who last modified this label version record.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  lot_code_format varchar [note: 'Format specification for the lot or batch code that will be printed on labels during production (e.g., \'YYMMDD-LLLL\' where LLLL is line code).']
  manufacturer_address varchar [note: 'Full address of the manufacturer as declared on the label for regulatory compliance and consumer contact.']
  manufacturer_name varchar [note: 'Name of the manufacturer as declared on the label for regulatory compliance.']
  market_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code identifying the market jurisdiction for this label version (e.g., USA, DEU, JPN).']
  net_content_declaration varchar [note: 'Net content']
  net_content_quantity decimal(18,6) [note: 'Numeric value of the net content quantity declared on the label.']
  net_content_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the net content quantity (e.g., ml, g, oz, fl_oz, count). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: ml|l|g|kg|oz|lb|fl_oz|gal|count|each — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  product_name_on_label varchar [note: 'The exact product name as it appears on the label artwork, which may differ from internal product names due to marketing or regulatory requirements.']
  recycling_symbols varchar [note: 'Recycling symbols and sustainability marks displayed on the label (e.g., \'Recyclable\', \'FSC Certified\', \'Green Dot\', resin identification codes).']
  regulatory_approval_reference varchar [note: 'Approval reference']
  regulatory_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current regulatory approval status of the label version in the target market jurisdiction. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|under_review|approved|rejected|withdrawn|expired — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  veeva_vault_document_code varchar [note: 'Reference identifier to the label artwork document stored in Veeva Vault regulatory document management system.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version']
  version_status varchar [note: 'Status (draft, approved, obsolete)']
  warning_statements varchar [note: 'Mandatory warning and precautionary statements required by regulatory authorities (e.g., \'Keep out of reach of children\', \'For external use only\').']
  warning_text varchar [note: 'Warnings']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or name of the person who created this label version record.']

  Note: 'Approved label versions for regulatory compliance'
}

Table regulatory.compliance_obligation {
  compliance_obligation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  compliance_responsible_employee_id varchar [note: 'Responsible person']
  compliance_responsible_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Each compliance obligation is owned by a specific employee; linking enables ownership tracking and audit.']
  cost_center_id decimal(18,2) [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Compliance budgeting assigns each obligation to a cost center for internal charge‑back and reporting.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Expense for a compliance obligation is posted to a specific GL account for financial statements.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Jurisdiction']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  advance_notice_period_days varchar [note: 'The number of days in advance that the business must be notified or begin preparation to meet this compliance obligation.']
  applicable_product_category varchar [note: 'The product category or categories to which this compliance obligation applies (e.g., cosmetics, household cleaners, personal care, food contact materials).']
  compliance_deadline date [note: 'The date by which the compliance obligation must be fulfilled to avoid regulatory penalties or non-compliance.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or context regarding this compliance obligation, including special instructions, historical context, or exceptions.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Status (compliant, non-compliant, pending)']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the estimated compliance cost (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  due_date date [note: 'Due date']
  effective_date date [note: 'Effective date']
  estimated_compliance_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'The estimated financial cost to fulfill this compliance obligation, including registration fees, testing costs, documentation, and labor.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date when this compliance obligation expires or is no longer applicable, if applicable.']
  frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency (annual, one-time)']
  governing_body varchar [note: 'The regulatory authority or governing body that enforces this obligation (e.g., FDA, EPA, CPSC, EU Commission).']
  governing_regulation varchar [note: 'The specific regulation, directive, or legal framework that mandates this obligation (e.g., CFR 21 Part 701, EU Directive 2009/48/EC, REACH Article 33).']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this compliance obligation is currently active and applicable to the business.']
  last_assessment_date date [note: 'Last assessment']
  last_compliance_verification_date date [note: 'The date when compliance with this obligation was last verified or audited.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  legal_reference varchar [note: 'Legal reference']
  next_assessment_date date [note: 'Next assessment']
  next_audit_date date [note: 'The scheduled date for the next internal or external audit of compliance with this obligation.']
  next_due_date date
  next_renewal_date date [note: 'The date when the next renewal or re-certification of this obligation is due.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  notification_sent_date date [note: 'The date when the compliance deadline notification was sent to the responsible owner.']
  notification_sent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether advance notification has been sent to the responsible owner regarding the upcoming compliance deadline.']
  obligation_code varchar [note: 'Obligation code']
  obligation_description varchar [note: 'Description']
  obligation_name varchar [note: 'Full descriptive name of the compliance obligation.']
  obligation_type varchar [note: 'Type (registration, testing, labeling)']
  penalty_for_non_compliance varchar [note: 'Penalty description']
  priority varchar [note: 'The business priority assigned to fulfilling this compliance obligation, used for resource allocation and scheduling.']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Framework']
  renewal_frequency varchar [note: 'The frequency at which this compliance obligation must be renewed or re-certified.']
  required_documentation varchar [note: 'List or description of the documentation required to fulfill this compliance obligation (e.g., Safety Data Sheet (SDS), ingredient declaration, test reports, certificates of analysis).']
  responsible_department varchar [note: 'The department or business unit responsible for managing this compliance obligation (e.g., Regulatory Affairs, Quality Assurance, Legal).']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'The assessed risk level associated with non-compliance with this obligation, based on potential business impact, regulatory scrutiny, and penalty severity.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier for this compliance obligation in the source system of record.']
  submission_method varchar [note: 'The method by which compliance documentation or filings must be submitted to the governing body.']
  submission_portal_url varchar [note: 'The web address of the electronic portal or system where compliance submissions must be filed, if applicable.']
  testing_requirement varchar [note: 'Description of any laboratory testing or analytical work required to demonstrate compliance (e.g., stability testing, microbial testing, heavy metals analysis, allergen testing).']

  Note: 'Regulatory compliance obligations'
}

Table regulatory.compliance_assessment {
  compliance_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  compliance_assessor_employee_id varchar [note: 'Assessor']
  compliance_obligation_id varchar [note: 'Obligation']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Assessment work generates expenses that must be posted to a GL account for financial reporting.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the manufacturing or distribution facility being assessed for regulatory compliance.']
  primary_compliance_assessor_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier for the individual who conducted the compliance assessment.']
  product_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific product formulation undergoing compliance assessment.']
  reviewer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier for the individual who reviewed and approved the compliance assessment.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Assessment date']
  assessment_method varchar [note: 'Method or approach used to conduct the compliance assessment (e.g., document review, laboratory test, site inspection, supplier audit, self-assessment, third-party certification).']
  assessment_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique identifier for the compliance assessment record, typically formatted as CA-YYYYNNNN.']
  assessment_result varchar [note: 'Result (pass, fail, conditional)']
  assessment_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Score']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'Type (internal, external)']
  assessor_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual or team who conducted the compliance assessment.']
  audit_trail_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier linking this compliance assessment to the audit trail or change history log for traceability and regulatory audit readiness.']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'Certificate number']
  certification_issued boolean [note: 'Certification flag']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the third-party certification or approval certificate obtained as evidence of compliance, if applicable.']
  closure_date date [note: 'Date on which the compliance assessment was formally closed after verification of corrective actions or confirmation of compliance.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional comments, notes, or observations related to the compliance assessment that provide context or clarification.']
  compliance_finding varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative of the compliance assessment finding, including observations, test results, and rationale for the compliance determination.']
  compliance_score decimal(5,2)
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance finding status indicating whether the product, formulation, or facility meets the regulatory requirement (compliant, non-compliant, conditional, pending review, not applicable).']
  corrective_action_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the corrective action plan required to remediate the non-compliance or conditional finding.']
  corrective_action_due_date date [note: 'Target date by which the corrective action must be completed to achieve compliance.']
  corrective_action_owner varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or department responsible for implementing the corrective action.']
  corrective_action_required boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether corrective action is required to address the compliance finding (True if corrective action is required, False otherwise).']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the corrective action implementation (not started, in progress, completed, verified, overdue).']
  corrective_actions_required boolean [note: 'CAPA required flag']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  evidence_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or URI to the supporting documentation, test reports, certificates, or dossiers that substantiate the compliance assessment finding.']
  findings varchar [note: 'Findings']
  follow_up_date date [note: 'Follow-up date']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code representing the regulatory jurisdiction under which the compliance assessment applies (e.g., USA, DEU, GBR, CHN).']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp indicating when the compliance assessment record was last modified or updated.']
  next_assessment_due_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next periodic compliance assessment or re-assessment.']
  non_conformances_count varchar [note: 'Non-conformances']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory authority or governing body responsible for the regulatory framework (e.g., FDA, EPA, ECHA, CPSC).']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'The governing regulatory framework under which the compliance assessment is conducted (e.g., CFR, IFRA, EU CLP, REACH, EPA, FDA, CPSC). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: CFR|IFRA|EU_CLP|REACH|EPA|FDA|CPSC — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  requirement_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the specific regulatory requirement being assessed for compliance.']
  requirement_reference varchar [note: 'Specific citation or reference to the regulatory requirement being assessed (e.g., 21 CFR 701.3, IFRA Standard 49, REACH Annex XVII Entry 23).']
  review_date date [note: 'Date on which the compliance assessment was formally reviewed and approved.']
  reviewer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual who reviewed and approved the compliance assessment findings.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk severity level associated with the compliance finding (critical, high, medium, low, negligible).']
  test_report_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the laboratory test report or analytical certificate supporting the compliance assessment, if applicable.']

  Note: 'Compliance assessments against obligations'
}

Table regulatory.reach_substance {
  reach_substance_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.jurisdiction. Business justification: Reach substances are regulated per jurisdiction; linking normalizes jurisdiction data and eliminates the duplicated code column.']
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Supplier']
  active_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this substance record is currently active and in use within the organization\'s product portfolio.']
  authorization_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the granted authorization expires and the substance can no longer be used unless renewed.']
  authorization_number varchar [note: 'Unique authorization number granted by the European Commission for use of an Annex XIV substance.']
  authorization_required boolean [note: 'Authorization required']
  authorization_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is subject to authorization requirements under REACH Annex XIV before it can be placed on the market or used.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'CAS number']
  cmr_classification varchar [note: 'Classification indicating whether the substance is carcinogenic, mutagenic, or toxic for reproduction, and its category level. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: carcinogenic|mutagenic|reprotoxic|cmr_category_1a|cmr_category_1b|cmr_category_2|not_cmr — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  dnel_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the DNEL value.']
  dnel_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'The level of exposure to the substance above which humans should not be exposed, expressed in mg/kg body weight/day or mg/m³.']
  downstream_user_notification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether downstream users must be notified of specific obligations or restrictions related to this substance.']
  ec_number varchar [note: 'EC number']
  endocrine_disruptor_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is identified as an endocrine disruptor under EU criteria.']
  exposure_scenario_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether exposure scenarios must be developed and communicated in the extended Safety Data Sheet for this substance.']
  ghs_pictogram_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of GHS pictogram codes required on labels (e.g., GHS02, GHS05, GHS07, GHS09).']
  h_statements varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of standardized hazard statement codes describing the nature of hazards (e.g., H302, H315, H400).']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'Classification and Labelling (CLP) hazard class and category codes assigned to the substance (e.g., Acute Tox. 3, Skin Corr. 1B, Aquatic Chronic 2).']
  last_evaluation_date date [note: 'Date when the substance was last evaluated by ECHA or competent authorities for compliance or risk assessment purposes.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  lead_registrant varchar [note: 'Lead registrant']
  market_access_status_eu varchar [note: 'Current market access status for placing the substance on the EU market.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next periodic review or re-evaluation of the substance registration or authorization.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  p_statements varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of standardized precautionary statement codes describing recommended measures to minimize or prevent adverse effects (e.g., P264, P280, P301+P312).']
  pbt_assessment varchar [note: 'Assessment result indicating whether the substance meets the criteria for being Persistent, Bioaccumulative and Toxic (PBT) or very Persistent and very Bioaccumulative (vPvB).']
  pnec_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the PNEC value.']
  pnec_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'The concentration of the substance below which adverse effects in the environmental sphere of concern are not expected to occur.']
  reach_registration_number varchar [note: 'REACH registration number']
  registration_date date [note: 'Registration date']
  registration_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the current REACH registration expires and renewal is required.']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Status (registered, pre-registered, exempt)']
  restriction_applicable boolean [note: 'Restriction applicable']
  restriction_conditions varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the specific conditions, limitations, or prohibitions applied to the substance under REACH Annex XVII restrictions.']
  restriction_entry_number varchar [note: 'The entry number in REACH Annex XVII that specifies the restriction applicable to this substance.']
  restriction_reference varchar [note: 'Restriction reference']
  restriction_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is subject to restrictions under REACH Annex XVII limiting or prohibiting its manufacture, use, or placing on the market.']
  sds_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a Safety Data Sheet must be provided for this substance under REACH Article 31.']
  sds_revision_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent revision of the Safety Data Sheet.']
  sds_version varchar [note: 'Current version number of the Safety Data Sheet for this substance.']
  sief_membership varchar [note: 'SIEF membership']
  signal_word varchar [note: 'GHS signal word indicating the relative level of severity of hazard: Danger (more severe) or Warning (less severe).']
  substance_name varchar [note: 'Substance name']
  substance_origin_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code indicating the primary country of origin or manufacture for this substance.']
  supplier_reference_number varchar [note: 'Internal reference number or code used by the supplier to identify this substance in their catalog or system.']
  svhc_flag boolean [note: 'SVHC flag']
  svhc_inclusion_date date [note: 'Date when the substance was added to the SVHC Candidate List by ECHA.']
  svhc_list_date date [note: 'SVHC list date']
  svhc_status varchar [note: 'Classification status indicating whether the substance is identified as a Substance of Very High Concern under REACH Article 57, requiring special authorization or restriction.']
  tonnage_band varchar [note: 'Tonnage band']
  use_descriptor_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of standardized use descriptor codes (SU, PC, PROC, ERC, AC) describing identified uses of the substance.']

  Note: 'REACH substance registrations and compliance'
}

Table regulatory.ifra_compliance_record {
  ifra_compliance_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  assessor_employee_id varchar [note: 'Assessor']
  product_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Formulation']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Fragrance supplier']
  actual_formulated_usage_level decimal(10,6) [note: 'Actual concentration of the fragrance ingredient in the finished product formulation. Expressed in the same unit as maximum_permitted_usage_level. Used to determine compliance status.']
  allergen_declaration_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fragrance ingredient is a recognized allergen requiring declaration on product labeling per EU Cosmetics Regulation or other jurisdictional requirements.']
  allergen_threshold_exceeded boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fragrance ingredient concentration exceeds the allergen labeling threshold (0.001% for leave-on, 0.01% for rinse-off products per EU regulation).']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the IFRA compliance record was formally approved by regulatory affairs. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Workflow approval status of the IFRA compliance record. Approved records are used for regulatory submissions and product release decisions.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory affairs manager or quality director who approved this IFRA compliance record for use in regulatory submissions.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Assessment date']
  assessment_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the next IFRA compliance reassessment is required. Triggered by IFRA standard updates or product reformulation. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  assessor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory affairs or quality assurance professional who performed the IFRA compliance assessment.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'Chemical Abstracts Service registry number uniquely identifying the fragrance ingredient chemical substance. Standard format: XXXXXX-XX-X.']
  certificate_expiry_date date [note: 'Certificate expiry']
  certificate_issue_date date [note: 'Certificate issue date']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'Certificate number']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free-text comments or notes from the assessor regarding special considerations, assumptions, or clarifications related to this IFRA compliance assessment.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Status (compliant, non-compliant)']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  exemption_justification varchar [note: 'Detailed justification text if an exemption or deviation from IFRA standard is claimed. Must include scientific rationale and risk assessment summary.']
  formulation_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the product formulation for which this IFRA compliance assessment applies. Links to PLM system for formulation change tracking.']
  fragrance_allergen_declaration varchar [note: 'Allergen declaration']
  fragrance_ingredient_name varchar [note: 'Name of the specific fragrance ingredient being assessed for IFRA compliance. May be a chemical name, INCI name, or proprietary fragrance component identifier.']
  geographic_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic markets or jurisdictions for which this IFRA compliance assessment applies. Pipe-separated list of ISO 3-letter country codes or regional identifiers (e.g., USA|CAN|GBR|DEU|FRA).']
  ifra_certificate_number varchar [note: 'Certificate number issued by fragrance supplier confirming IFRA compliance of the fragrance compound. Required for audit and regulatory submissions.']
  ifra_product_category varchar [note: 'IFRA product category classification determining usage restrictions. Categories range from 1 (toys) to 12 (air fresheners), with subcategories for leave-on vs rinse-off products. Each category has specific maximum permitted usage levels. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: Category 1|Category 2|Category 3|Category 4|Category 5A|Category 5B|Category 5C|Category 5D|Category 6|Category 7A|Category 7B|Category 8|Category 9|Category 10A|Category 10B|Category 11A|Category 11B|Category 12 — 18 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  ifra_standard_reference varchar
  ifra_standard_version varchar [note: 'IFRA standard version']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this IFRA compliance record is currently active and valid. Inactive records represent historical assessments superseded by newer evaluations.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent periodic review of this IFRA compliance record. Ensures ongoing compliance monitoring as IFRA standards evolve. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  max_concentration_pct decimal(10,6)
  maximum_permitted_usage_level decimal(10,6) [note: 'Maximum permitted concentration of the fragrance ingredient as defined by IFRA standard for the specified product category. Expressed as percentage (e.g., 0.5 = 0.5%). Null if no restriction applies.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next periodic review of this IFRA compliance record. Typically triggered annually or upon IFRA standard amendment. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  product_category varchar [note: 'IFRA product category']
  product_type varchar [note: 'High-level product type classification determining IFRA category assignment and usage restrictions. Leave-on products have stricter limits than rinse-off products.']
  qra_reference_number varchar [note: 'Reference number to the Quantitative Risk Assessment document supporting the safety substantiation of this fragrance ingredient usage. Required for regulatory defense.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system from which this IFRA compliance record originated (e.g., Veeva Vault, SAP QM, PLM system). Used for data lineage and reconciliation.']
  restricted_substances_present boolean [note: 'Restricted substances flag']
  restriction_type varchar [note: 'Type of IFRA restriction applied to the ingredient. Prohibited means banned entirely; specification means allowed with purity/quality requirements; restricted means usage level limits apply.']
  risk_assessment_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number to the detailed risk assessment document or safety dossier supporting this IFRA compliance determination. Links to document management system.']
  safety_margin_percentage decimal(10,4) [note: 'Calculated safety margin between actual usage level and maximum permitted level, expressed as percentage. Positive values indicate compliance buffer; negative values indicate non-compliance.']
  usage_level_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for usage levels. Typically percentage (%) for most fragrance ingredients, or ppm/mg/kg for trace components.']

  Note: 'IFRA compliance records for fragrances'
}

Table regulatory.surveillance_event {
  surveillance_event_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  cost_center_id decimal(18,2) [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Investigation costs from post‑market surveillance are charged to a cost center for cost tracking.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Jurisdiction']
  lot_batch_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific production lot or batch implicated in the surveillance event for traceability and potential recall scope determination.']
  regulatory_registration_id varchar
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  surveillance_investigation_assigned_to_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Post‑market surveillance investigations are assigned to an employee; FK enables investigation tracking.']
  surveillance_responsible_employee_id varchar [note: 'Responsible person']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturing batch or lot number of the affected product for traceability and scope analysis.']
  consumer_complaint_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the consumer complaint or adverse event as reported, capturing symptoms, circumstances, and product usage context.']
  corrective_action_completion_date date [note: 'Date when the corrective action was fully implemented and verified for effectiveness.']
  corrective_action_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the corrective action plan implemented or planned to address the root cause and prevent recurrence.']
  corrective_action_required boolean [note: 'CAPA required']
  corrective_action_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether corrective action is required based on the investigation findings and risk assessment.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Country']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  event_date date [note: 'Event date']
  event_description varchar [note: 'Description']
  event_occurrence_date date [note: 'Date when the adverse event or product issue actually occurred or was first observed by the consumer or reporter.']
  event_received_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the surveillance signal was first received by the organization, marking the start of the regulatory clock for reporting obligations.']
  event_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the post-market surveillance event investigation and resolution workflow. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: reported|under_investigation|root_cause_identified|corrective_action_pending|corrective_action_completed|closed|escalated_to_recall — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  event_type varchar [note: 'Type (adverse event, complaint, quality issue)']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Expiration or best-before date of the affected product, relevant for stability-related events.']
  financial_impact_estimate decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated financial impact of the surveillance event including investigation costs, corrective actions, potential recall costs, and liability exposure in USD.']
  geographic_market varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country codes indicating the geographic markets where the affected product was distributed, pipe-separated for multiple countries.']
  gtin varchar [note: 'Global Trade Item Number identifying the product involved in the surveillance event for international traceability.']
  injury_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the injury or adverse health effect reported by the consumer or healthcare provider.']
  injury_reported_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the surveillance event involved a reported consumer injury or adverse health effect.']
  investigation_completion_date date [note: 'Date when the investigation was completed and root cause determination was finalized.']
  investigation_start_date date [note: 'Date when the formal investigation of the surveillance event was initiated.']
  investigation_status varchar [note: 'Investigation status']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  manufacturing_date date [note: 'Date when the affected product batch was manufactured, used for shelf-life and stability analysis.']
  medical_treatment_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the reported injury required medical treatment or healthcare intervention.']
  modified_by_user varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who last modified the surveillance event record for accountability and audit purposes.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  recall_classification varchar [note: 'FDA recall classification (Class I, II, III) or equivalent regulatory classification indicating the level of health hazard.']
  recall_initiated boolean [note: 'Recall flag']
  recall_initiated_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the surveillance event resulted in a product recall or market withdrawal action.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority to which the surveillance event must be reported based on jurisdiction and product category. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|CPSC|EPA|EU_RAPEX|Health_Canada|TGA_Australia|ANVISA_Brazil|CFDA_China|MHRA_UK|none — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  regulatory_report_date date [note: 'Report date']
  regulatory_report_number varchar [note: 'Report number']
  regulatory_report_reference_number varchar [note: 'Official reference or tracking number assigned by the regulatory authority upon submission of the surveillance report.']
  regulatory_report_submission_date date [note: 'Date when the mandatory regulatory report was submitted to the applicable authority.']
  regulatory_reporting_required boolean [note: 'Reporting required flag']
  regulatory_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the surveillance event triggers a mandatory regulatory reporting obligation to FDA, CPSC, EPA, or other authorities.']
  reporter_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the reporter for written communication and documentation exchange.']
  reporter_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary phone number of the reporter for follow-up investigation and clarification.']
  reporter_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual who reported the surveillance event, required for follow-up and regulatory submissions.']
  reporter_type varchar [note: 'Reporter type (consumer, healthcare, regulator)']
  root_cause varchar [note: 'Root cause']
  root_cause_category varchar [note: 'Standardized classification of the root cause for trending and analytics purposes. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: manufacturing_defect|formulation_issue|packaging_failure|labeling_error|contamination|stability_failure|consumer_misuse|no_defect_found|under_investigation — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  root_cause_identified varchar [note: 'Documented root cause of the surveillance event as determined through investigation, including manufacturing defect, formulation issue, packaging failure, or misuse.']
  severity varchar [note: 'Severity (low, medium, high, critical)']
  severity_classification varchar [note: 'Risk-based severity rating of the surveillance event based on potential harm to consumers and regulatory impact.']
  signal_source varchar [note: 'Origin channel through which the post-market surveillance signal was received. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: consumer_direct|call_center|retailer|distributor|regulatory_authority|social_media|healthcare_provider|internal_audit — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  sku varchar [note: 'Stock Keeping Unit code of the affected product for traceability and inventory correlation.']
  surveillance_event_description varchar
  surveillance_event_status varchar
  surveillance_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the surveillance event, externally referenced in regulatory submissions and internal tracking systems.']
  units_affected_estimate varchar [note: 'Estimated number of product units potentially affected by the surveillance event, used for recall scope and risk assessment.']

  Note: 'Post-market surveillance events'
}

Table regulatory.product_recall {
  product_recall_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  cost_center_id decimal(18,2) [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Recall expenses (logistics, disposal) are allocated to a cost center for budgeting and reporting.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.jurisdiction. Business justification: Product recalls are managed per jurisdiction; linking provides a normalized jurisdiction reference.']
  logistics_shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.logistics_shipment. Business justification: Recall execution must pinpoint shipments containing recalled items; linking product_recall to logistics_shipment supports targeted recall logistics and reporting.']
  product_coordinator_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Recall coordination is managed by a specific employee; FK supports recall project management.']
  product_recall_coordinator_employee_id varchar [note: 'Coordinator']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  surveillance_event_id varchar [note: 'Triggering event']
  affected_channels varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of distribution channels impacted by recall (e.g., Retail, E-commerce, Wholesale, DSD, DTC). Defines which go-to-market channels received affected product.']
  affected_countries varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country codes where recalled products were distributed (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX, GBR, DEU).']
  affected_gtin_list varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of GTIN/UPC/EAN codes for recalled products. Enables point-of-sale and supply chain identification of affected items.']
  affected_lot_batch_numbers varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of manufacturing lot or batch numbers included in the recall. Enables traceability to specific production runs.']
  affected_lot_numbers varchar [note: 'Affected lots']
  affected_production_date_range_end date [note: 'End date of the production date range for affected products. Used when recall spans multiple production dates.']
  affected_production_date_range_start date [note: 'Start date of the production date range for affected products. Used when recall spans multiple production dates.']
  affected_sku_list varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of SKU codes for all product variants included in the recall. Links recall to specific product master records.']
  affected_states_provinces varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of state or province codes where recalled products were distributed within countries. Used for regional recalls.']
  authority_notification_date date [note: 'Date when the company notified the relevant regulatory authority of the recall. FDA requires notification within 24 hours of recall initiation.']
  consumer_hotline_number varchar [note: 'Toll-free or dedicated phone number for consumers to call with questions about the recall or to request remedies.']
  consumer_remedy_instructions varchar [note: 'Detailed instructions for consumers on how to return, dispose of, or obtain remedy for recalled products. Includes contact information and process steps.']
  consumer_remedy_type varchar [note: 'Type of corrective action or compensation offered to consumers who purchased recalled products. Defines how consumers are made whole.']
  corrective_action_plan_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the Corrective and Preventive Action (CAPA) plan implemented to prevent recurrence of the issue that caused the recall.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency']
  effectiveness_check_date date [note: 'Date when the recall effectiveness check was conducted to verify that all consignees were notified and appropriate action taken. FDA requires effectiveness checks at specified intervals.']
  effectiveness_check_result varchar [note: 'Result of the recall effectiveness check. Effective: recall objectives met. Partially Effective: some objectives met. Ineffective: recall objectives not met. Pending: check in progress.']
  estimated_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated cost']
  estimated_financial_impact_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated total financial cost of the recall including product value, logistics, disposal, consumer remedies, and administrative costs. Reported in company reporting currency.']
  geographic_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic scope']
  health_hazard_evaluation varchar [note: 'Assessment of the health risk posed by the recalled product. Describes potential adverse health consequences and likelihood of occurrence. Used to determine recall classification.']
  initiated_date date
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  press_release_date date [note: 'Press release date']
  press_release_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number, URL, or document identifier for the official press release or public announcement of the recall.']
  public_notification_date date [note: 'Date when the recall was publicly announced through press release, media, or regulatory agency posting.']
  public_notification_issued boolean [note: 'Public notification']
  quantity_recalled_units decimal(18,3) [note: 'Total number of product units subject to recall. Represents the volume of affected inventory across all distribution levels.']
  quantity_recovered_units decimal(18,3) [note: 'Number of recalled product units successfully recovered and removed from distribution. Used to calculate recall effectiveness.']
  recall_class varchar [note: 'Class (I, II, III)']
  recall_classification varchar [note: 'FDA/CPSC classification of recall severity. Class I: dangerous or defective products that could cause serious health problems or death. Class II: products that might cause temporary health problem or slight threat of serious nature. Class III: products unlikely to cause adverse health reaction but violate FDA labeling or manufacturing regulations. Voluntary: company-initiated without regulatory mandate. Market Withdrawal: minor violation not subject to FDA legal action.']
  recall_completion_date date [note: 'Completion date']
  recall_coordinator_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the recall coordinator for internal and external communications regarding the recall event.']
  recall_coordinator_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the recall coordinator for urgent communications regarding the recall event.']
  recall_effectiveness_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of recalled units successfully recovered (quantity_recovered_units / quantity_recalled_units * 100). FDA requires effectiveness checks to verify recall completion.']
  recall_initiation_date date [note: 'Initiation date']
  recall_number varchar [note: 'Recall number']
  recall_reason varchar [note: 'Reason']
  recall_reason_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code categorizing the root cause of the recall (e.g., contamination, mislabeling, undeclared allergen, packaging defect, microbial contamination, foreign material).']
  recall_reason_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative explanation of the defect, hazard, or violation that triggered the recall. Includes specific product issue, potential health risk, and circumstances of discovery.']
  recall_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic scope of the recall action. Defines the market territories affected by the recall.']
  recall_status varchar [note: 'Status (ongoing, completed, terminated)']
  recall_type varchar [note: 'Type (voluntary, mandatory)']
  recall_website_url varchar [note: 'URL of the dedicated webpage providing detailed recall information, consumer instructions, and remedy request forms.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this recall record was first created in the system. Audit trail for data governance.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this recall record was last modified. Audit trail for data governance and change tracking.']
  recovery_rate_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Recovery rate']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the government agency or regulatory body overseeing the recall (e.g., FDA, CPSC, EPA, Health Canada, EU Commission). May be multiple authorities for international recalls.']
  regulatory_authority_notified boolean [note: 'Authority notified']
  regulatory_mandate_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the recall was mandated by a regulatory authority (True) or initiated voluntarily by the company (False).']
  root_cause_analysis_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the formal root cause analysis document or investigation report that identified the underlying cause of the product defect or contamination.']
  units_affected varchar [note: 'Units affected']
  units_recovered varchar [note: 'Units recovered']

  Note: 'Product recall events'
}

Table regulatory.jurisdiction {
  jurisdiction_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  parent_jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to a parent jurisdiction if this jurisdiction is a sub-jurisdiction (e.g., a state within a country, or a country within a regional bloc). Null for top-level jurisdictions.']
  animal_testing_ban boolean [note: 'Animal testing ban']
  animal_testing_ban_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the jurisdiction prohibits the sale of products tested on animals (True) or allows it (False).']
  cfr_reference varchar [note: 'The specific CFR title and part number applicable to this jurisdiction (e.g., 21 CFR Part 700 for cosmetics). Primarily used for US FDA jurisdictions.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, clarifications, or special instructions related to this jurisdiction.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Contact email']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Official phone number for contacting the regulatory authority for this jurisdiction.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO country code']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date from which this jurisdiction definition and its requirements became effective.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which this jurisdiction definition expires or is superseded. Null if currently active with no planned expiration.']
  gmp_certification_required boolean [note: 'GMP required']
  gmp_compliance_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) certification or compliance is mandatory for products sold in this jurisdiction (True) or not (False).']
  ifra_compliance_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether compliance with IFRA standards for fragrance ingredients is required (True) or not (False).']
  ingredient_declaration_format decimal(9,4) [note: 'The required format for ingredient listing on labels: INCI (International Nomenclature of Cosmetic Ingredients), CAS (Chemical Abstracts Service number), common name, or proprietary (brand-specific naming).']
  jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'Jurisdiction code']
  jurisdiction_name varchar [note: 'Jurisdiction name']
  jurisdiction_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the jurisdiction record: active (in use), inactive (no longer applicable), pending (awaiting activation), superseded (replaced by newer version).']
  jurisdiction_type varchar [note: 'Type (country, region, state)']
  labeling_language_primary varchar [note: 'ISO 639 two- or three-letter code for the primary language required on product labels in this jurisdiction (e.g., en, fr, de, zh).']
  labeling_language_secondary varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of ISO 639 language codes for additional languages required or recommended on labels (e.g., fr,nl for Belgium).']
  language_code varchar [note: 'Official language']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  market_entry_requirement_type varchar [note: 'The type of regulatory requirement for market entry: notification (simple filing), registration (formal registration), pre-market approval (full dossier review before sale), post-market surveillance (monitoring after launch), or voluntary (no mandatory requirement).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  notification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a formal notification to the regulatory authority is required before product launch (True) or not (False).']
  post_market_surveillance_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether ongoing post-market surveillance (adverse event reporting, product monitoring) is mandatory (True) or not (False).']
  pre_market_approval_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether pre-market approval (full dossier review and authorization before sale) is required (True) or not (False).']
  product_information_file_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a Product Information File (PIF) or dossier must be maintained and made available to authorities (True) or not (False).']
  product_notification_required boolean [note: 'Notification required']
  reach_registration_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether REACH registration for chemical substances is required for this jurisdiction (True) or not (False). Primarily applicable to EU and EEA jurisdictions.']
  region varchar
  region_code varchar [note: 'Region code']
  registration_required boolean [note: 'Registration required']
  registration_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether formal product registration with the regulatory authority is mandatory (True) or not (False).']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the governing regulatory body or agency responsible for enforcement within this jurisdiction (e.g., FDA, EPA, CPSC, European Commission).']
  regulatory_authority_name varchar [note: 'Authority name']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Framework (FDA, EMA, PMDA)']
  responsible_person_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a designated Responsible Person (RP) within the jurisdiction is required for regulatory compliance (True) or not (False). Common in EU jurisdictions.']
  sds_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a Safety Data Sheet (SDS) or Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) must be provided for products in this jurisdiction (True) or not (False).']
  submission_portal_url varchar [note: 'URL of the online portal or system used for submitting regulatory notifications, registrations, or dossiers to this jurisdiction.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Website']

  Note: 'Regulatory jurisdictions'
}

Table regulatory.restricted_substance {
  restricted_substance_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Jurisdiction']
  affected_product_categories varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of product categories or SKU families in which this substance is restricted or prohibited (e.g., cosmetics, household cleaners, food contact materials, children\'s products).']
  alternative_substance_recommendations varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of CAS numbers or substance names recommended as safer alternatives for formulation substitution.']
  applicable_regulations varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of all regulations, directives, or legal frameworks under which this substance is restricted (e.g., EU REACH, California Prop 65, FDA 21 CFR 700, EPA FIFRA, CPSC regulations).']
  authorization_status varchar [note: 'Current status of regulatory authorization for use of the substance in specific applications or markets.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'CAS number']
  cfr_reference varchar [note: 'Specific CFR title, part, and section citation(s) that govern the use, labeling, or prohibition of this substance in the United States.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional context, special handling instructions, or notes regarding the restricted substance and its regulatory status.']
  concentration_unit decimal(9,4) [note: 'Unit of measure for the maximum permitted concentration: percent by weight, percent by volume, parts per million (ppm), parts per billion (ppb), or milligrams per kilogram.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  downstream_notification_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether manufacturers and importers must notify downstream users (formulators, distributors, retailers) of the presence of this substance in articles or mixtures.']
  ec_number varchar [note: 'EC number']
  effective_date date [note: 'Effective date']
  epa_restricted_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is subject to EPA restrictions under TSCA, FIFRA, or other environmental regulations.']
  exemptions varchar [note: 'Exemptions']
  fda_prohibited_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is explicitly prohibited by the FDA for use in cosmetics, drugs, or food contact materials under CFR Title 21.']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'GHS hazard class and category codes assigned to the substance (e.g., Acute Tox. 3, Skin Corr. 1B, Carc. 1A) for safety data sheet and labeling purposes.']
  ifra_prohibition_category varchar [note: 'IFRA product category (1-11) in which the substance is prohibited or restricted, ranging from Category 1 (lip products) to Category 11 (non-skin contact products).']
  ifra_standard_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the applicable IFRA Standard number and amendment that governs the use of this substance in fragrance compounds.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date on which the restricted substance record was last reviewed for regulatory updates, new restrictions, or changes in applicable law.']
  legal_reference varchar [note: 'Legal reference']
  max_allowed_concentration_pct decimal(10,6)
  maximum_concentration_pct decimal(10,6) [note: 'Max concentration']
  maximum_permitted_concentration decimal(10,6) [note: 'Maximum allowable concentration of the substance in finished products, expressed as a percentage by weight or volume, as defined by applicable regulations.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Date on which the next periodic review of this restricted substance record is scheduled to ensure ongoing compliance with evolving regulations.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  owning_team varchar [note: 'Name of the internal team or department responsible for maintaining this restricted substance record (e.g., Regulatory Affairs, Product Safety, Quality Assurance).']
  post_market_surveillance_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether ongoing post-market surveillance, adverse event reporting, or periodic safety updates are required for products containing this substance.']
  primary_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary contact for regulatory inquiries and substance compliance questions.']
  primary_contact_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual responsible for regulatory compliance and updates related to this restricted substance.']
  product_category_applicability varchar [note: 'Applicable categories']
  prop_65_listing boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is listed under California Proposition 65 as known to cause cancer, birth defects, or reproductive harm, requiring warning labels for California sales.']
  reach_registration_number decimal(9,4) [note: 'Unique registration number assigned under EU REACH for substances manufactured or imported in quantities of one tonne or more per year.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the primary regulatory body or agency that issued the restriction (e.g., ECHA, FDA, EPA, CPSC, Health Canada).']
  restriction_description varchar [note: 'Description']
  restriction_type varchar [note: 'Type (banned, restricted, limited)']
  rspo_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance (if palm-derived) meets RSPO certification requirements for sustainable sourcing.']
  sds_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a Safety Data Sheet (formerly MSDS) must be maintained and provided to downstream users for this substance.']
  substance_name varchar [note: 'Substance name']
  sunset_date date [note: 'Sunset date']
  svhc_status boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is identified as a Substance of Very High Concern under REACH, triggering additional authorization and notification obligations.']
  tonnage_band varchar [note: 'Annual production or import volume range in metric tonnes per year, used for REACH registration tier determination.']

  Note: 'Restricted substances by jurisdiction'
}

Table regulatory.regulatory_claim {
  regulatory_claim_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  claim_substantiation_id varchar [note: 'Substantiation']
  compliance_reviewer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Claims are reviewed by a designated employee; FK supports claim review audit and reporting.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Jurisdiction']
  product_brand_id varchar [note: 'FK to product.product_brand']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  adverse_event_reporting_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether adverse events related to the claim must be reported to regulatory authorities. True if reporting is required, False otherwise.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Approval date']
  approval_reference varchar [note: 'Approval reference']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Status (approved, pending, rejected)']
  approved_markets varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of market codes or regions where the claim is approved for use (e.g., USA, EU, LATAM, APAC). Enables market-specific claim deployment.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Unique certification or registration number issued by the third-party certifying body. Null if no certification applies.']
  cfr_reference varchar [note: 'Specific CFR citation that governs the claim (e.g., 21 CFR 101.54 for health claims, 16 CFR Part 260 for environmental claims). Provides regulatory traceability.']
  claim_category varchar [note: 'Category']
  claim_code varchar [note: 'Claim code']
  claim_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the regulatory claim, formatted as RC- followed by 8 digits. Used for external reference and tracking.']
  claim_scope varchar [note: 'Scope of the claim application: product-specific (applies to one SKU), brand-level (applies to all products under a brand), category-level (applies to a product category), or ingredient-specific (applies to products containing a specific ingredient).']
  claim_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regulatory claim: draft (being prepared), pending review (submitted for approval), approved (authorized for use), rejected (denied by authority), expired (approval period ended), or withdrawn (voluntarily removed).']
  claim_text varchar [note: 'Claim text']
  claim_type varchar [note: 'Type (efficacy, safety, environmental)']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, context, or special instructions related to the claim. May include reviewer comments, historical context, or implementation guidance.']
  compliance_review_date date [note: 'Date when the internal compliance review was completed. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  compliance_review_outcome varchar [note: 'Result of internal FTC/FDA compliance review: compliant (meets all requirements), non-compliant (violates regulations), requires modification (needs changes before use), pending review (under evaluation), or not reviewed (not yet assessed).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  disclaimer_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a disclaimer statement must accompany the claim on labels or marketing materials. True if disclaimer is required, False otherwise.']
  disclaimer_text varchar [note: 'Full text of the required disclaimer that must accompany the claim. Null if no disclaimer is required. Must be displayed in accordance with regulatory guidelines.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the approved claim becomes valid for use on products and marketing materials. May differ from approval date due to implementation lead time. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  eu_regulation_reference varchar [note: 'Specific EU regulation or directive that governs the claim (e.g., Regulation 1223/2009 for cosmetics, Regulation 1924/2006 for nutrition and health claims). Null if not applicable to EU markets.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Expiry date']
  ifra_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the claim complies with IFRA standards for fragrance ingredients. True if compliant, False if not applicable or non-compliant. Relevant for cosmetics and personal care products.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'ISO 639-1 two-letter language code for the claim text (e.g., en for English, es for Spanish, fr for French). Supports multi-language claim management.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Next review']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  owning_team varchar [note: 'Name of the internal team or department responsible for managing the claim (e.g., Regulatory Affairs, Product Development, Marketing). Supports accountability and workflow routing.']
  post_market_surveillance_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether post-market surveillance or ongoing monitoring is required for the claim. True if surveillance is mandated, False otherwise.']
  primary_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary contact person for the claim. Used for notifications and inquiries.']
  primary_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary contact person responsible for the claim. Typically a regulatory affairs specialist or product manager.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'High-level category of the product associated with the claim: cosmetics, personal care, household products, food, dietary supplements, over-the-counter (OTC) drugs, or medical devices. Determines applicable regulatory framework. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: cosmetics|personal_care|household|food|dietary_supplement|otc_drug|medical_device — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Authority']
  regulatory_body varchar
  renewal_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Number of months between required renewals for the claim. Null if no renewal is required. Common values: 12, 24, 36, 60.']
  renewal_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the claim requires periodic renewal with the regulatory authority. True if renewal is required, False if approval is indefinite.']
  review_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Review frequency']
  sku varchar [note: 'Stock Keeping Unit identifier for the specific product variant to which the claim applies. Enables SKU-level claim tracking.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date when the claim was submitted to the regulatory authority for review. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  substantiation_document_reference varchar [note: 'Document reference']
  substantiation_method varchar [note: 'Substantiation method']
  supporting_study_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or citation for the study, test report, or documentation that substantiates the claim. May include internal study IDs, published journal citations, or third-party certification numbers.']
  third_party_certification varchar [note: 'Name of third-party certification body or seal that validates the claim (e.g., USDA Organic, Leaping Bunny, EcoCert, NSF, Rainforest Alliance). Null if no third-party certification applies.']
  usage_restriction varchar [note: 'Any restrictions or conditions on the use of the claim, such as required disclaimers, context limitations, or co-claim requirements. Free text field for detailed restriction documentation.']

  Note: 'Regulatory-approved product claims'
}

Table regulatory.action {
  action_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  action_responsible_employee_id varchar [note: 'Responsible person']
  compliance_assessment_id varchar
  cost_center_id decimal(18,2) [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Costs of corrective actions are charged to a cost center for internal cost control.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Penalties or fees from regulatory actions are posted to a GL account for financial compliance.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Jurisdiction']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the manufacturing facility, warehouse, or distribution center that is the subject of this regulatory action. Links to facility master data. Nullable when action is product-specific rather than facility-specific.']
  owner_employee_id varchar
  primary_regulatory_action_responsible_party_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Regulatory actions assign a responsible employee for follow‑up; FK enables tracking of accountability.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  surveillance_event_id varchar [note: 'Related event']
  action_date date [note: 'Action date']
  action_description varchar [note: 'Description']
  action_number varchar [note: 'Official reference number assigned by the regulatory authority to this enforcement action (e.g., warning letter number, import alert number, consent decree docket number).']
  action_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regulatory action. Tracks progression from initial receipt through company response, corrective action implementation, and final resolution or closure by the authority. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: received|under_review|response_submitted|corrective_action_in_progress|resolved|closed|appealed — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  action_type varchar [note: 'Type (warning letter, import alert, consent decree)']
  affected_facility_list varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of facility names or codes affected by this regulatory action when multiple sites are involved. Used for multi-site enforcement actions or consent decrees covering multiple locations.']
  affected_product_list varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of product names, SKUs (Stock Keeping Units), or GTINs (Global Trade Item Numbers) affected by this regulatory action when multiple products are involved. Used when action spans multiple products or product families.']
