  audit_completion_date date [note: 'Date the mandated external audit was completed and final audit report submitted to the regulatory authority. Null if no external audit is required or if audit is still in progress.']
  board_notification_date date [note: 'Date the Board of Directors was formally notified of this regulatory action. Required for material enforcement actions that could impact financial statements, stock price, or corporate reputation. Null if board notification was not required.']
  citation_reference varchar [note: 'Specific legal or regulatory code sections cited in the enforcement action (e.g., 21 CFR 211.110 for GMP violations, 40 CFR 261 for hazardous waste, 16 CFR Part 1500 for CPSC). Provides the legal basis for the action.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free-text field for internal notes, strategic considerations, lessons learned, or additional context about this regulatory action. May include legal strategy notes, root cause analysis summary, or cross-functional coordination details. Confidential internal use only.']
  completed_date date
  corrective_action_plan_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier to the formal Corrective and Preventive Action (CAPA) plan submitted to the regulatory authority in response to this action. Links to the CAPA management system where detailed remediation steps, timelines, and verification evidence are documented.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Currency']
  due_date date
  escalation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this regulatory action has been escalated to executive leadership (CEO, COO, General Counsel) due to severity, financial impact, or reputational risk. True for actions requiring board-level visibility; False for routine enforcement handled at operational level.']
  external_audit_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the regulatory action mandates an independent third-party audit or inspection to verify corrective actions. True when authority requires external verification; False when internal verification is sufficient.']
  external_auditor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the independent third-party auditing firm or consultant engaged to verify corrective actions as required by the regulatory authority. Null if no external audit is required.']
  financial_penalty_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary fine or civil penalty assessed by the regulatory authority as part of the enforcement action. Expressed in the currency specified in penalty_currency_code. Null if no financial penalty was imposed.']
  insurance_claim_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number for any insurance claim filed to recover costs associated with this regulatory action (e.g., recall expenses, legal fees, penalties). Links to the insurance claims management system. Null if no claim was filed.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'The regulatory body or government agency that issued the enforcement action. FDA (Food and Drug Administration) for food/drug/cosmetics; EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) for environmental violations; CPSC (Consumer Product Safety Commission) for product safety; EU REACH for chemical compliance; FTC (Federal Trade Commission) for advertising; OSHA for workplace safety; state agencies for local enforcement; international authorities for foreign jurisdictions. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|EPA|CPSC|EU_REACH|FTC|OSHA|STATE_AGENCY|INTERNATIONAL_AUTHORITY — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  legal_counsel_assigned varchar [note: 'Name of the internal or external legal counsel assigned to advise on this regulatory action. Critical for consent decrees, injunctions, civil penalties, and criminal prosecutions where legal strategy is required.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  penalty_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Penalty amount']
  penalty_currency_code decimal(18,2) [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the financial penalty amount (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Null if no financial penalty was imposed.']
  previous_action_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the earlier regulatory action that cited the same or related violations. Used to track repeat violations and enforcement escalation patterns. Null if this is a first-time violation.']
  public_disclosure boolean [note: 'Public disclosure flag']
  public_disclosure_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the regulatory action has been publicly disclosed by the authority (e.g., published on FDA warning letters database, EPA enforcement actions website). True if publicly available; False if confidential or under seal.']
  public_disclosure_url varchar [note: 'Web address where the regulatory action is publicly published by the issuing authority. Typically links to FDA warning letters database, EPA enforcement actions, CPSC recall notices, or equivalent public registries. Null if not publicly disclosed.']
  recall_class varchar [note: 'FDA recall classification indicating the health hazard level. Class I: dangerous or defective products that could cause serious health problems or death; Class II: products that might cause temporary health problem or slight threat of serious nature; Class III: products unlikely to cause adverse health reaction but violate FDA regulations. Null if no recall is involved.']
  recall_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the regulatory action mandates a product recall. True for mandatory recalls ordered by the authority; False for actions that do not require recall or for voluntary recalls initiated by the company.']
  received_date date [note: 'Date the company officially received notification of the regulatory action. May differ from action_date due to transmission delays or publication lag.']
  reference_number varchar [note: 'Reference number']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Authority']
  repeat_violation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this regulatory action cites violations that were previously identified in earlier inspections or enforcement actions. True for repeat violations, which typically result in escalated enforcement and higher penalties; False for first-time violations.']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Resolution date']
  resolution_status varchar [note: 'Resolution status']
  response_due_date date [note: 'Response due']
  response_submitted_date date [note: 'Response submitted']
  responsible_party_email varchar [note: 'Corporate email address of the internal executive or department head accountable for this regulatory action. Used for escalation and executive reporting.']
  risk_score varchar [note: 'Internal risk assessment score (0-100 scale) evaluating the potential business impact of this regulatory action. Considers factors such as financial exposure, reputational damage, operational disruption, and likelihood of escalation. Higher scores indicate greater risk requiring executive attention.']
  severity varchar [note: 'Severity']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Regulatory assessment of the seriousness of the violation. Critical: immediate health/safety risk requiring urgent action; Major: significant compliance failure with potential harm; Minor: procedural non-compliance with low risk; Observation: noted deficiency not yet a violation but requiring attention.']
  violation_category varchar [note: 'Primary classification of the regulatory violation cited in the action. GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice) violations relate to production standards; labeling violations involve packaging claims or ingredient declarations; safety violations concern product hazards; environmental violations address EPA compliance; advertising violations involve FTC rules; ingredient violations relate to prohibited or undeclared substances; quality system violations concern QMS (Quality Management System) deficiencies; record-keeping violations involve documentation failures; reporting violations concern mandatory disclosure failures. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: gmp_violation|labeling_violation|safety_violation|environmental_violation|advertising_violation|ingredient_violation|quality_system_violation|record_keeping_violation|reporting_violation — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']

  Note: 'Regulatory actions and enforcement'
}

Table regulatory.cpsc_filing {
  cpsc_filing_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  cpsc_responsible_employee_id varchar [note: 'Responsible person']
  cpsc_submitted_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the person who submitted the filing. Links to HR system for accountability.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional notes, internal comments, or context regarding the filing, CPSC interactions, or corrective actions.']
  corrective_action_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the corrective action plan, including consumer notification strategy, remedy process, and timeline.']
  corrective_action_taken varchar [note: 'Corrective action']
  corrective_action_type varchar [note: 'Type of corrective action proposed or implemented to address the product hazard. May include multiple remedies. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: recall|repair|replacement|refund|warning|product_modification|none_proposed — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  cpsc_case_number varchar [note: 'Official case number assigned by CPSC upon receipt and acceptance of the filing. Used for all subsequent correspondence and tracking.']
  cpsc_response_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of CPSC response, including any requirements, recommendations, or determinations made by the agency.']
  cpsc_response_received_date date [note: 'Date CPSC provided official response to the filing, including acceptance, request for additional information, or determination.']
  cpsc_response_type varchar [note: 'Type of response received from CPSC regarding the filing. Indicates regulatory action required or determination made.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  defect_description varchar [note: 'Technical description of the product defect or failure mode that creates the hazard. Includes root cause analysis when known.']
  fatality_count varchar [note: 'Number of deaths associated with the product hazard. Triggers immediate CPSC notification and investigation.']
  filing_date date [note: 'Filing date']
  filing_number varchar [note: 'Filing number']
  filing_status varchar [note: 'Status']
  filing_type varchar [note: 'Type (initial, update, closure)']
  gtin varchar [note: '14-digit GTIN of the product involved. Global standard for product identification across supply chain.']
  hazard_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the product hazard, defect, or safety issue. Explains how the product can cause harm to consumers.']
  hazard_type varchar [note: 'Primary type of hazard posed by the product defect. Categorizes the nature of risk to consumers. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: fire|burn|laceration|choking|chemical_exposure|electrical_shock|fall|entrapment|suffocation|poisoning|other — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  incident_count varchar [note: 'Total number of reported incidents involving the product hazard, including those without injury.']
  incident_date date [note: 'Incident date']
  incident_description varchar [note: 'Incident description']
  injury_count varchar [note: 'Number of reported injuries associated with the product hazard. Includes both confirmed and alleged injuries.']
  injury_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of injuries sustained by consumers, including medical treatment required. May include multiple incident summaries.']
  injury_severity varchar [note: 'Highest severity level of injuries reported. Used to assess risk level and prioritize regulatory response.']
  injury_type varchar [note: 'Injury type']
  knowledge_date date [note: 'Date the company first obtained information reasonably supporting the conclusion that a product contains a defect which could create a substantial product hazard. Triggers 24-hour reporting obligation under Section 15(b).']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  legal_review_completed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether legal counsel has reviewed and approved the filing before submission. Required for Section 15(b) reports.']
  legal_reviewer_name varchar [note: 'Name of the legal counsel who reviewed the filing.']
  lot_batch_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturing lot or batch number of the affected product units. Essential for determining scope of hazard and recall.']
  manufacturing_date_range_end date [note: 'End date of the manufacturing period for affected product units.']
  manufacturing_date_range_start date [note: 'Start date of the manufacturing period for affected product units.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  population_at_risk varchar [note: 'Description of consumer population particularly vulnerable to the hazard (e.g., children under 3, elderly, pregnant women). Used for targeted warnings and recalls.']
  product_defect_description varchar [note: 'Defect description']
  product_model_number varchar [note: 'Specific model or SKU number of the product involved in the incident. Critical for identifying affected units.']
  product_name varchar [note: 'Commercial name of the product involved in the CPSC filing as known to consumers.']
  recall_announced_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a public recall has been announced in conjunction with this filing. True if recall press release issued.']
  recall_announcement_date date [note: 'Date the product recall was publicly announced via CPSC press release and website posting.']
  recall_initiated boolean [note: 'Recall flag']
  recall_number varchar [note: 'Recall number']
  regulatory_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the regulatory contact for official CPSC correspondence.']
  regulatory_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary regulatory affairs contact responsible for managing this filing and CPSC communications.']
  saferproducts_report_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier assigned to the report in the SaferProducts.gov public database if the filing resulted in a public posting.']
  severity varchar [note: 'Severity']
  submitted_by_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the submitter for CPSC correspondence and follow-up communications.']
  submitted_by_name varchar [note: 'Name of the individual who submitted the filing to CPSC on behalf of the company.']
  supporting_document_count varchar [note: 'Number of supporting documents attached to the filing (test reports, photos, consumer complaints, medical records, etc.).']
  tracking_label_required boolean
  units_affected varchar [note: 'Units affected']
  units_sold varchar [note: 'Total number of units of the affected product sold to consumers. Helps determine recall scope and consumer notification requirements.']
  upc varchar [note: '12-digit UPC barcode of the product involved in the filing. Used for retail identification and tracking.']
  vault_reference_code varchar [note: 'Reference identifier to the document management system (Veeva Vault) where all filing documentation is stored.']

  Note: 'CPSC filings for consumer products'
}

Table regulatory.epa_registration {
  epa_registration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the internal facility master record for the manufacturing site producing this registered product. Links EPA registration to internal facility management.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  submission_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the regulatory submission record that resulted in this EPA registration. Links to the submission dossier and supporting documentation.']
  active_ingredient_list varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of active ingredient(s) in the registered product. Each active ingredient is the chemical substance responsible for the pesticidal or antimicrobial effect. Format: Chemical Name (CAS Number); Chemical Name (CAS Number).']
  active_ingredient_name varchar [note: 'Active ingredient']
  active_ingredient_percentage decimal(10,6) [note: 'Active ingredient %']
  annual_reporting_required boolean [note: 'Annual reporting flag']
  approval_date date
  cancellation_date date [note: 'Date when the EPA registration was cancelled, either voluntarily by the registrant or involuntarily by EPA. Nullable for active registrations.']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why the EPA registration was cancelled. Includes voluntary cancellation reasons (e.g., product discontinuation, business decision) or involuntary reasons (e.g., safety concerns, data deficiencies, regulatory non-compliance).']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or special conditions related to this EPA registration. May include internal notes on registration strategy, EPA correspondence summaries, or special handling instructions.']
  company_number varchar [note: 'Five-digit EPA company number assigned to the registrant. This is the first component of the EPA registration number and identifies the company holding the registration.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  data_call_in_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the registrant must submit data or studies in response to an EPA data call-in. Failure to meet this deadline may result in registration cancellation.']
  data_call_in_requirement varchar [note: 'Description of any outstanding data call-in requirements issued by EPA. Data call-ins require registrants to submit additional studies or data to support continued registration. Includes requirement reference number and due date.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the EPA registration becomes legally effective and the product may be manufactured, distributed, and sold under this registration.']
  epa_establishment_number varchar [note: 'EPA establishment number identifying the facility where the product is manufactured. Format: Company Number-State Code-Facility Number (e.g., 12345-CA-001). Required on product labels.']
  epa_registration_number varchar [note: 'EPA registration number']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the EPA registration expires and is no longer valid unless renewed. Nullable for registrations without a fixed expiration (subject to periodic review).']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Expiry date']
  formulation_type varchar [note: 'Physical form and delivery method of the registered product. Determines packaging, application method, and handling requirements. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: liquid|aerosol|wipe|powder|granular|tablet|gel|paste|ready_to_use|concentrate — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  label_approval_date date [note: 'Label approval date']
  label_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the EPA-approved product label. The label must be approved before the product can be marketed. Approved = label accepted by EPA, Pending Review = submitted awaiting EPA review, Conditionally Approved = approved with minor changes required, Rejected = label not acceptable, Revision Required = EPA requested changes.']
  label_approved boolean [note: 'Label approved']
  label_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the currently approved EPA label. Used to track label revisions and ensure correct label is in use for manufacturing and distribution.']
  last_annual_report_date date [note: 'Last report date']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  last_renewal_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent renewal action for this EPA registration. Used to track renewal history and calculate next renewal due date.']
  next_renewal_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the next renewal application must be submitted to EPA to maintain continuous registration status. Critical for compliance planning.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  product_brand_name varchar [note: 'Commercial brand name under which the product is marketed to consumers. May differ from the registered product name.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'EPA product classification category based on intended use and target pest. Antimicrobial = broad-spectrum microbial control, Disinfectant = kills bacteria/viruses on surfaces, Sanitizer = reduces microbial load, Insecticide = controls insects, Rodenticide = controls rodents, Fungicide = controls fungi, Herbicide = controls weeds. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: antimicrobial|disinfectant|sanitizer|insecticide|rodenticide|fungicide|herbicide — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  product_name varchar [note: 'Official product name as registered with EPA. This is the name that appears on the approved label and in EPA databases.']
  product_use_category varchar [note: 'Use category']
  registrant_name varchar [note: 'Registrant name']
  registrant_number varchar [note: 'Registrant number']
  registration_date date [note: 'Registration date']
  registration_review_case_number decimal(9,4) [note: 'EPA case number for the periodic registration review process. EPA reviews all pesticide registrations on a 15-year cycle to ensure they continue to meet safety standards.']
  registration_review_decision_date date [note: 'Date when EPA issued the most recent registration review decision for this product. Used to track compliance with periodic review requirements.']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Status']
  registration_type varchar [note: 'Type (pesticide, antimicrobial)']
  regulatory_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary regulatory affairs contact for this EPA registration. Used for internal coordination and EPA correspondence tracking.']
  regulatory_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary regulatory affairs contact responsible for managing this EPA registration. Internal point of contact for registration maintenance and EPA correspondence.']
  reregistration_eligibility_decision decimal(9,4) [note: 'EPA determination of whether the product is eligible for reregistration under updated safety and environmental standards. Eligible = meets current standards, Ineligible = does not meet standards and requires reformulation or cancellation, Pending = under EPA review, Not Applicable = not subject to reregistration.']
  signal_word varchar [note: 'Required signal word on the product label indicating relative acute toxicity. Danger = highest toxicity (Category I), Warning = moderate toxicity (Category II), Caution = lower toxicity (Category III), None = minimal toxicity (Category IV).']
  target_pest_list varchar [note: 'List of target pests, pathogens, or organisms that the product is registered to control (e.g., bacteria, viruses, mold, ants, cockroaches). Defines the approved efficacy claims.']
  use_classification varchar [note: 'EPA classification determining who may purchase and apply the product. General Use = available to general public, Restricted Use = requires certified applicator due to potential hazards to environment or applicator.']
  use_site_description varchar [note: 'Description of approved use sites and application locations for the registered product (e.g., household surfaces, food contact surfaces, hospitals, schools, outdoor residential). Defines where the product may legally be applied.']
  vault_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier to the EPA registration documents stored in the regulatory document vault system (e.g., Veeva Vault). Links to approved labels, safety data sheets, and registration correspondence.']

  Note: 'EPA registrations for regulated products'
}

Table regulatory.change {
  change_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key']
  change_requested_by_employee_id varchar
  change_responsible_employee_id varchar [note: 'Responsible person']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.jurisdiction. Business justification: Regulatory changes are tied to a specific jurisdiction; linking enables consistent jurisdiction lookup and removes the duplicated code column.']
  primary_regulatory_change_responsible_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Regulatory change implementation is owned by a specific employee; linking records ownership for change management.']
  regulatory_registration_id varchar [note: 'Registration']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Product']
  superseded_change_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on change (superseded_change_id)']
  affected_product_category varchar [note: 'Product category or categories impacted by the regulatory change.']
  affected_product_scope varchar [note: 'Scope description of the products impacted (e.g., all SKUs in a brand, specific formulations).']
  approval_date date [note: 'Approval date']
  approval_required boolean [note: 'Approval required']
  approved_date date
  change_category varchar [note: 'Category (major, minor, administrative)']
  change_description varchar [note: 'Description']
  change_number varchar [note: 'Change number']
  change_status varchar [note: 'Status']
  change_type varchar [note: 'Type (formulation, label, manufacturing)']
  compliance_risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk rating associated with non‑compliance to the change.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Record creation']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory change becomes effective for the business.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory change ceases to be applicable, if applicable.']
  impact_assessment varchar [note: 'Impact assessment']
  impact_assessment_date date [note: 'Date the impact assessment was completed or recorded.']
  impact_assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the impact assessment process.']
  impact_severity varchar [note: 'Severity level of the regulatory impact on the business.']
  implementation_date date [note: 'Implementation date']
  implementation_end_date date [note: 'Date when implementation activities were completed.']
  implementation_start_date date [note: 'Date when implementation activities began.']
  implementation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the implementation of required actions.']
  is_mandatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether compliance with the change is mandatory (true) or optional (false).']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last update']
  notes varchar [note: 'Notes']
  notification_date date [note: 'Notification date']
  notification_type varchar [note: 'Notification type (prior approval, annual report)']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the change for planning and resource allocation.']
  reason varchar [note: 'Reason']
  regulatory_notification_required boolean [note: 'Notification required']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Citation or reference number of the regulation (e.g., CFR section, EU directive).']
  requested_date date
  required_action_deadline date [note: 'Latest date by which required compliance actions must be taken.']
  source varchar [note: 'Origin of the change (regulatory authority, industry body, court decision).']
  source_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory authority issuing the change (e.g., FDA, EPA).']
  source_body varchar [note: 'Governing body or standard organization responsible for the change.']
  title varchar [note: 'Brief title summarizing the regulatory change.']
  url varchar [note: 'Link to the official document or announcement describing the change.']

  Note: 'Regulatory change control records'
}

Table sustainability.esg_commitment {
  esg_commitment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each ESG commitment record.']
  esg_approved_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Approver']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.jurisdiction. Business justification: Regulatory frameworks require ESG commitments per jurisdiction; linking ensures compliance tracking for each jurisdiction.']
  owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Owner employee']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the commitment received formal approval.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the executive or authority who approved the commitment.']
  baseline_value decimal(18,4) [note: 'Measured value of the metric in the baseline year.']
  baseline_year varchar [note: 'Year used as the reference point for measuring progress.']
  commitment_code varchar [note: 'External reference code or number used in public disclosures and internal tracking.']
  commitment_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the ESG pledge, including scope and rationale.']
  commitment_name varchar [note: 'Name of the commitment']
  commitment_owner varchar [note: 'Internal department or business unit responsible for the commitment.']
  commitment_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic or operational scope of the commitment.']
  commitment_status varchar [note: 'Status (active, achieved, deferred, cancelled)']
  commitment_type varchar [note: 'Category of the ESG pledge (e.g., carbon neutrality, water stewardship).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the commitment record was first created in the system.']
  disclosure_status varchar [note: 'Whether the commitment is publicly disclosed, kept private, or confidential.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the commitment becomes binding.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the commitment ends or is scheduled to expire (null for open‑ended).']
  esg_commitment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the commitment.']
  external_reference_code varchar [note: 'Identifier from external registries (e.g., CDP, RE100) linked to this commitment.']
  governing_body varchar [note: 'External framework or initiative the commitment aligns with.']
  last_progress_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent progress update.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for baseline and target values.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information or comments.']
  progress_cadence varchar [note: 'Frequency at which progress against the commitment is reported.']
  public_disclosure_flag boolean [note: 'Public disclosure flag']
  reporting_framework varchar [note: 'Standard framework used for ESG reporting of this commitment.']
  scope varchar [note: 'Scope (global, regional, facility-level)']
  target_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measurement']
  target_value decimal(18,4) [note: 'Desired metric value to be reached by the target year.']
  target_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year by which the commitment target should be achieved.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the commitment record.']
  verification_method varchar [note: 'Method used to verify the reported progress.']

  Note: 'Master record for Consumer Goods formal ESG commitments, targets, and pledges. Captures commitment type (carbon neutrality, net-zero, water stewardship, zero-waste-to-landfill, deforestation-free), target year, baseline year and value, target value, measurement unit, commitment owner, governing body alignment (SBTi, UN Global Compact, RE100), public disclosure status, and progress tracking cadence. Serves as the authoritative registry linking to periodic commitment_progress records for time-series tracking. Referenced by esg_disclosure for external reporting.'
}

Table sustainability.carbon_emission {
  carbon_emission_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each carbon emission record.']
  carbon_offset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.carbon_offset. Business justification: Carbon emission records may reference a purchased/retired offset; linking to carbon_offset centralizes offset details.']
  distribution_facility_id varchar [note: 'Distribution facility']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Link carbon_emission to esg_commitment to associate each emission record with the relevant ESG commitment.']
  logistics_shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.logistics_shipment. Business justification: Required for Scope 3 carbon accounting: map each shipment to its emission record for regulatory and sustainability reporting.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the manufacturing or distribution facility where the emission originated.']
  production_line_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific production line or equipment generating the emission.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the product associated with the emission event, if applicable.']
  supply_chain_activity_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the upstream or downstream activity (e.g., raw material extraction, logistics) linked to the emission.']
  activity_type varchar [note: 'Specific activity type (e.g., manufacturing, logistics, packaging) that generated the emission.']
  auditor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the person or entity that performed verification.']
  calculation_method varchar [note: 'Calculation method']
  calculation_methodology varchar [note: 'Methodology used to calculate the emission (e.g., GHG Protocol, ISO 14064, or custom model).']
  carbon_intensity_factor decimal(12,6) [note: 'Ratio of emissions to production output (e.g., tonnes CO₂e per unit produced).']
  cdp_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'CDP reporting flag']
  cdpr_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the emission record must be disclosed to CDP.']
  co2e_quantity_tonnes decimal(15,5) [note: 'Measured or calculated greenhouse gas emissions expressed as carbon dioxide equivalent in metric tonnes.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the emission record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_flag boolean [note: 'Indicator of the confidence level in the emission data.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the data: sensor reading, calculation, estimate, or reported value.']
  emission_factor decimal(12,6) [note: 'Factor applied in the calculation, expressed in CO₂e per unit of activity (e.g., kg CO₂e per kWh).']
  emission_factor_date date [note: 'Effective date of the emission factor applied.']
  emission_factor_source varchar [note: 'Reference or provider of the emission factor used.']
  emission_factor_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the emission factor dataset.']
  emission_source varchar [note: 'Emission source (fuel, electricity, transport, process)']
  emission_source_category varchar [note: 'Category of emission source such as combustion, electricity use, transport, raw material processing, waste, or other.']
  emission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the emission measurement or calculation was recorded.']
  energy_consumption_mwh decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total energy consumed associated with the emission event, expressed in megawatt‑hours.']
  external_reporting_standard varchar [note: 'Standard used for external ESG reporting of this emission.']
  geographic_location varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the emission occurred.']
  internal_project_code varchar [note: 'Code of the internal sustainability project linked to the emission.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measurement for the emission quantity; default is tonnes of CO₂e.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations about the emission record.']
  offset_quantity_tonnes decimal(12,5) [note: 'Quantity of CO₂e offset, in metric tonnes.']
  offset_type varchar [note: 'Category of carbon offset applied.']
  record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the record.']
  reporting_period varchar [note: 'Specific reporting period within the year.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'Reporting period end']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Reporting period start']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal or calendar year for which the emission is reported.']
  scope varchar [note: 'GHG accounting scope: Scope 1 (direct), Scope 2 (purchased energy), or Scope 3 (value chain).']
  scope_1_emissions_mt_co2e decimal(18,4) [note: 'Scope 1 emissions (metric tons CO2e)']
  scope_2_emissions_mt_co2e decimal(18,4) [note: 'Scope 2 emissions (metric tons CO2e)']
  scope_3_emissions_mt_co2e decimal(18,4) [note: 'Scope 3 emissions (metric tons CO2e)']
  scope_category varchar
  total_emissions_mt_co2e decimal(18,4) [note: 'Total emissions (metric tons CO2e)']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the emission record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date when the emission record was verified.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Status of third‑party or internal verification of the emission record.']
  verified_by varchar [note: 'Verified by']
  water_consumption_m3 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Volume of water used in the process linked to the emission, in cubic metres.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions measured or calculated at the facility, production line, product, or supply chain activity level. Captures emission date, emission source category (Scope 1 direct combustion, Scope 2 purchased energy, Scope 3 upstream/downstream), activity type (manufacturing, logistics, raw material extraction, packaging), CO2e quantity in metric tonnes, calculation methodology (GHG Protocol, ISO 14064), emission factor applied, data quality flag, and verification status. Primary operational record for carbon footprint tracking and CDP/GRI reporting.'
}

Table sustainability.energy_consumption {
  energy_consumption_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each energy consumption record.']
  distribution_facility_id varchar [note: 'Distribution facility']
  energy_certificate_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.energy_certificate. Business justification: Energy consumption can be tied to a renewable energy certificate for verification and reporting.']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Link energy_consumption to esg_commitment to tie energy use to ESG commitments.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing facility, distribution center, or office where the energy was consumed.']
  carbon_emission_factor decimal(10,5) [note: 'Factor used to convert energy_quantity to CO₂e emissions (kg CO₂e per unit).']
  consumption_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Consumption amount']
  consumption_kwh decimal(18,3)
  consumption_reference varchar [note: 'Business reference code for the consumption record, used in reporting and reconciliation.']
  consumption_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the energy consumption measurement was taken or recorded.']
  consumption_unit varchar [note: 'Consumption unit (kWh, MWh, GJ, therms)']
  cost_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cost amount']
  cost_currency_code varchar [note: 'Cost currency code']
  created_timestamp timestamp
  currency_code varchar
  data_quality_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Data quality score']
  data_quality_status varchar [note: 'Assessment of the reliability of the consumption measurement.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Source ERP or utility system that supplied the consumption data.']
  energy_consumption_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the consumption record.']
  energy_intensity_ratio decimal(10,4) [note: 'Energy consumption per unit of production output (e.g., MWh per ton of product).']
  energy_quantity decimal(15,3) [note: 'Amount of energy consumed during the period, expressed in the unit defined by energy_unit.']
  energy_source varchar
  energy_type varchar [note: 'Category of energy consumed.']
  energy_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for energy_quantity (megawatt‑hours or gigajoules).']
  is_renewable boolean
  iso_50001_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the measurement complies with ISO 50001 energy management standards (True/False).']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  measurement_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the consumption data (direct meter reading, utility bill, or estimated).']
  measurement_unit varchar
  meter_code varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the physical meter or virtual metering point used to capture the consumption.']
  meter_reading_source varchar [note: 'Meter reading source']
  meter_reference varchar
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the consumption entry.']
  period_end_date date [note: 'Last calendar date of the reporting period for the consumption record.']
  period_start_date date [note: 'First calendar date of the reporting period for the consumption record.']
  reading_date date
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the consumption record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the consumption record.']
  renewable_energy_flag boolean [note: 'Renewable energy flag']
  renewable_energy_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Share of the total energy consumption that was sourced from renewable resources, expressed as a percent.']
  renewable_percentage decimal(5,2)
  reporting_period varchar
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'Reporting period end']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Reporting period start']
  reporting_quarter varchar [note: 'Fiscal quarter (1‑4) associated with the consumption record.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year for which the consumption data is reported.']
  scope varchar [note: 'GHG accounting scope applicable to the consumption (Scope 1, Scope 2, or Scope 3).']
  tariff_rate decimal(10,4) [note: 'Applicable cost rate for the energy type during the consumption period, expressed in local currency per unit.']
  total_cost decimal(18,2)
  updated_timestamp timestamp

  Note: 'Transactional record of energy consumed across manufacturing facilities, distribution centers, and offices. Captures consumption period (daily, monthly), facility reference, energy type (natural gas, electricity, steam, renewable solar/wind), quantity in MWh or GJ, renewable energy percentage, energy intensity ratio (per unit of production), tariff rate, meter ID, and ISO 50001 compliance flag. Feeds into Scope 1 and Scope 2 carbon emission calculations and energy reduction program tracking.'
}

Table sustainability.water_consumption {
  water_consumption_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each water consumption record.']
  distribution_facility_id varchar [note: 'Distribution facility']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Water consumption contributes to ESG commitments; linking enables aggregation by commitment.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the manufacturing or processing facility where water was measured.']
  carbon_footprint_kg_co2e decimal(12,3) [note: 'Estimated CO₂‑equivalent emissions associated with the water consumption, expressed in kilograms.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional notes or observations about the water measurement.']
  consumption_cubic_meters decimal(18,3)
  consumption_volume_cubic_meters decimal(18,4) [note: 'Consumption volume (cubic meters)']
  consumption_volume_m3 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Net volume of water actually consumed by the facility processes, measured in cubic meters.']
  cost_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Cost amount']
  cost_currency_code varchar [note: 'Cost currency code']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_flag boolean [note: 'Assessment of the reliability of the recorded data.']
  discharge_cubic_meters decimal(18,3)
  discharge_destination varchar [note: 'Final destination of the discharged water.']
  discharge_volume_cubic_meters decimal(18,4) [note: 'Discharge volume (cubic meters)']
  discharge_volume_m3 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Volume of water discharged from the facility after use, measured in cubic meters.']
  event_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the water measurement event was recorded.']
  is_recycled boolean
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  measurement_method varchar [note: 'Method used to obtain the water volume figures.']
  measurement_period_end date [note: 'Last calendar date of the water measurement reporting period.']
  measurement_period_start date [note: 'First calendar date of the water measurement reporting period.']
  measurement_unit varchar
  reading_date date
  recorded_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user or system process that entered the record.']
  recycled_percentage decimal(5,2)
  recycled_water_volume_cubic_meters decimal(18,4) [note: 'Recycled water volume (cubic meters)']
  regulatory_permit_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the water use permit or license governing the withdrawal.']
  reporting_period varchar
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'Reporting period end']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Reporting period start']
  reporting_year varchar
  source_type varchar
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  water_consumption_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the water consumption record.']
  water_intensity_per_unit decimal(18,6) [note: 'Water intensity per unit']
  water_quality_indicator varchar [note: 'Key water quality parameter recorded alongside volume data.']
  water_recycling_rate_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of withdrawn water that is recycled or reused within the facility.']
  water_source varchar [note: 'Water source (municipal, groundwater, surface_water, recycled)']
  water_source_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the water source used for the facility.']
  water_stress_area_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility is located in a water‑stress region (True) or not (False).']
  withdrawal_volume_m3 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total volume of water withdrawn from the source during the reporting period, measured in cubic meters.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of water withdrawal, usage, and discharge at the facility or process level. Captures measurement period, facility reference, water source type (municipal, groundwater, surface water, recycled), withdrawal volume in cubic meters, consumption volume, discharge volume, discharge destination (sewer, waterway, treatment plant), water stress area flag (based on WRI Aqueduct), water recycling rate, and regulatory permit reference. Supports water stewardship commitments and CDP Water disclosure.'
}

Table sustainability.waste_generation {
  waste_generation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for waste_generation']
  circular_initiative_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.circular_initiative. Business justification: Waste generation is often mitigated through circular initiatives; linking tracks which initiative addresses each waste record.']
  distribution_facility_id varchar [note: 'Distribution facility']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Link waste_generation to esg_commitment to associate waste data with ESG commitments.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing or distribution facility where waste was generated.']
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the external contractor responsible for waste handling.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the waste record was first created in the system.']
  disposal_cost_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Disposal cost amount']
  disposal_cost_currency_code varchar [note: 'Disposal cost currency code']
  disposal_method varchar [note: 'Method used to dispose or treat the waste.']
  diversion_rate_pct decimal(5,2)
  diversion_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of waste diverted from landfill (e.g., recycled or composted).']
  epa_reportable_flag boolean [note: 'True if the waste record must be reported to EPA under hazardous waste regulations.']
  hazardous_flag boolean
  hazardous_waste_permit_number varchar [note: 'Hazardous waste permit number']
  is_recycled boolean
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  manifest_number varchar [note: 'Regulatory manifest number for hazardous waste shipments.']
  measurement_unit varchar
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional comments or observations.']
  quantity_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for waste_quantity.']
  recycled_amount_kg decimal(18,4) [note: 'Recycled amount (kg)']
  recycling_rate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Recycling rate percentage']
  regulatory_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the waste handling complies with applicable EPA/ISO 14001 regulations.']
  reporting_period varchar
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'Reporting period end']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Reporting period start']
  reporting_year varchar
  transaction_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the waste transaction (e.g., waste ticket or manifest number).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the waste record.']
  waste_amount_kg decimal(18,4) [note: 'Waste amount (kg)']
  waste_category varchar
  waste_category_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code (e.g., EPA waste code) representing the waste category.']
  waste_date date [note: 'Date the waste was generated or recorded at the facility.']
  waste_generation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the waste record.']
  waste_hauler_name varchar [note: 'Waste hauler name']
  waste_quantity decimal(12,3) [note: 'Amount of waste generated.']
  waste_quantity_tonnes decimal(15,4)
  waste_stream_type varchar [note: 'Category of waste material.']
  waste_type varchar
  zero_waste_to_landfill_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility aims for zero waste to landfill for this record (true/false).']

  Note: 'Transactional record of waste generated, diverted, and disposed of at manufacturing and distribution facilities. Captures waste generation date, facility reference, waste stream type (plastic, cardboard, organic, hazardous, e-waste), waste quantity in kg or tonnes, disposal method (landfill, incineration, recycling, composting, energy recovery), diversion rate, waste contractor reference, manifest number for hazardous waste, and zero-waste-to-landfill program flag. Supports circular economy KPIs and EPA/OSHA regulatory compliance.'
}

Table sustainability.packaging_profile {
  packaging_profile_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the packaging profile record.']
  product_lca_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.product_lca. Business justification: Packaging profiles are linked to product LCA studies to provide lifecycle impact context.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: Enables mapping packaging profiles to SKUs for sustainability reporting and material compliance.']
  additional_certification varchar [note: 'Other sustainability certifications applicable to the packaging (e.g., RSPO, ISO 14001).']
  bio_based_content_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Bio-based content percentage']
  carbon_footprint_kg_co2e decimal(10,3) [note: 'Estimated greenhouse‑gas emissions associated with the packaging, expressed in kilograms CO₂‑equivalent.']
  component_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the packaging element (primary, secondary, or tertiary).']
  compostable boolean [note: 'True if the packaging holds a recognized compostability certification.']
  compostable_flag boolean [note: 'Compostable flag']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the packaging profile record was first created.']
  design_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the packaging design (e.g., "v2.1").']
  effective_date date [note: 'Effective date']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the packaging profile is retired or superseded (null if open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the packaging profile becomes active for use.']
  end_of_life_disposal_method varchar [note: 'Designated disposal route for the packaging after consumer use.']
  energy_usage_kwh decimal(10,2) [note: 'Electrical energy consumed to manufacture the packaging component.']
  eu_packaging_waste_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Compliance status with the EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation.']
  fsc_certified boolean [note: 'True if paper‑based components are FSC certified.']
  fsc_certified_flag boolean [note: 'FSC certified flag']
  gtin varchar [note: 'Universal product identifier associated with the packaged product.']
  how2recycle_label varchar [note: 'How2Recycle label']
  is_compostable boolean
  is_recyclable boolean
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent sustainability review of the packaging configuration.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  lightweighting_reduction_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage reduction in weight compared with the previous version of the packaging.']
  material_composition_aluminum_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Proportion of aluminum material in the packaging component.']
  material_composition_glass_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Proportion of glass material in the packaging component.']
  material_composition_paper_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Proportion of paper or cardboard material in the packaging component.']
  material_composition_pcr_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the material that is post‑consumer recycled content.']
  material_composition_virgin_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of virgin (non‑recycled) plastic in the packaging.']
  material_primary varchar [note: 'Main material used for the packaging component.']
  material_source varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the material source (e.g., "recycled PET from post‑consumer bottles").']
  material_subtype varchar [note: 'Material subtype (PET, HDPE, cardboard, aluminum)']
  material_type varchar
  packaging_component_name varchar [note: 'Packaging component name']
  packaging_height_cm decimal(6,2) [note: 'External height of the packaging component in centimeters.']
  packaging_length_cm decimal(6,2) [note: 'External length of the packaging component in centimeters.']
  packaging_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name describing the packaging configuration (e.g., "Eco‑Lite Primary Bottle").']
  packaging_profile_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the packaging profile.']
  packaging_supplier varchar [note: 'Name of the external supplier providing the packaging component.']
  packaging_weight_g decimal(12,3)
  packaging_weight_grams decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total weight of the packaging component in grams.']
  packaging_width_cm decimal(6,2) [note: 'External width of the packaging component in centimeters.']
  pcr_content_pct decimal(5,2)
  post_consumer_recycled_content_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Post-consumer recycled content percentage']
  product_sku varchar [note: 'SKU of the product that uses this packaging configuration.']
  recyclability_code varchar
  recyclability_rating varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the packaging is recyclable, non‑recyclable, or rating unknown.']
  recyclable_flag boolean [note: 'Recyclable flag']
  recycled_content_pct decimal(5,2)
  recycled_content_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Overall percentage of recycled material present in the packaging.']
  recycled_content_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Recycled content percentage']
  reporting_year varchar
  reusable boolean [note: 'True if the packaging is designed for multiple use cycles.']
  reusable_flag boolean [note: 'Reusable flag']
  sustainability_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Overall sustainability rating assigned by internal assessment (scale 0‑100).']
  units_per_package varchar [note: 'Number of individual product units contained in a single packaging unit.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the packaging profile record.']
  water_usage_liters decimal(10,2) [note: 'Volume of water consumed in the production of the packaging component.']
  weight_grams decimal(18,4) [note: 'Weight (grams)']

  Note: 'Master record defining the sustainability attributes of a product\'s packaging configuration. Captures SKU/GTIN reference, packaging component type (primary, secondary, tertiary), material composition (PCR plastic %, virgin plastic %, glass, aluminum, paper/cardboard), recyclability rating, compostability certification, recycled content percentage, packaging weight in grams, lightweighting reduction vs. prior version, FSC certification flag for paper-based materials, and EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation compliance status. SSOT for packaging sustainability data linked to the product domain.'
}

Table sustainability.sourcing_certification {
  sourcing_certification_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for sourcing_certification']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Sourcing certifications support ESG commitments; linking enables commitment‑level reporting of certifications.']
  primary_sourcing_supplier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the certified party (supplier or internal facility).']
  raw_material_spec_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the raw material or ingredient.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'SKU']
  sourcing_supplier_id varchar
  annual_certified_volume decimal(15,3) [note: 'Annual volume of the raw material covered by the certification.']
  audit_date date [note: 'Audit date']
  audit_report_reference varchar [note: 'Reference code or URL to the audit report document.']
  audit_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the certification audit.']
  certificate_document_url varchar [note: 'Certificate document URL']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'Official certificate number issued by the certification body.']
  certification_body varchar [note: 'Organization that issued the certification.']
  certification_scope varchar [note: 'Scope of the certification (mass balance, segregated, or book-and-claim).']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the certification.']
  certification_type varchar [note: 'Type of sustainable sourcing certification (e.g., RSPO, FSC, Fair Trade).']
  certification_url varchar [note: 'Web link to the certification details or public registry entry.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes regarding compliance observations or actions.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance status of the certified material.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the certification record was first created in the data lake.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system that provided the certification record (e.g., SAP S/4HANA, Veeva Vault).']
  effective_date date
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the certification becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the certification expires or is no longer valid.']
  expiry_date date
  geographic_region varchar [note: 'Geographic region or country code where the certification applies. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: USA|CAN|MEX|BRA|CHN|IND|... — promote to reference product]']
  is_active boolean
  issue_date date [note: 'Issue date']
  last_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent audit.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  last_verified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the certification data was last verified for accuracy.']
  next_audit_date date [note: 'Next audit date']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-form notes related to the certification.']
  raw_material_name varchar [note: 'Name of the raw material or ingredient covered by the certification.']
  renewal_notice_date date [note: 'Date when a renewal notice was sent to the certified entity.']
  renewal_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the certification is due for renewal.']
  scope_description varchar
  sourcing_certification_status varchar
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the certification record.']
  volume_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the certified volume (e.g., kg, ton).']

  Note: 'Master record for sustainable sourcing certifications held by Consumer Goods or its suppliers for specific raw materials or ingredients. Captures certification type (RSPO, FSC, Rainforest Alliance, Fair Trade, UTZ, organic), certified entity (supplier or internal facility), raw material or ingredient covered, certification body, certificate number, issue date, expiry date, certification scope (mass balance, segregated, book-and-claim), annual certified volume, and audit status. Supports RSPO and FSC compliance reporting and Scope 3 sustainable procurement claims.'
}

Table sustainability.environmental_permit {
  environmental_permit_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the environmental permit record.']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Environmental permits are required to meet ESG commitments; linking provides permit visibility per commitment.']
  jurisdiction_id varchar
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the facility to which the permit applies.']
  responsible_employee_id varchar [note: 'Responsible employee']
  activity_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the activity authorized by the permit (e.g., manufacturing process, waste handling).']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance status of the permit based on monitoring and inspections.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the permit record was first created in the system.']
  discharge_limit decimal(18,4) [note: 'Maximum allowable discharge quantity for the permitted activity.']
  effective_date date
  emission_limit decimal(18,4) [note: 'Maximum allowable emission quantity for the permitted activity.']
  environmental_permit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the permit.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date the permit expires or must be renewed.']
  inspection_status varchar [note: 'Outcome of the latest inspection.']
  iso_14001_linkage varchar [note: 'Reference to the facility\'s ISO 14001 Environmental Management System certification status.']
  issue_date date [note: 'Date the permit was originally issued.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'Regulatory body that issued the permit (e.g., U.S. EPA, state agency, local agency, EU competent authority).']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent regulatory inspection of the permit.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  limit_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for emission or discharge limits.']
  monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'How often compliance monitoring is required.']
  next_inspection_date date [note: 'Next inspection date']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-form field for additional comments or special conditions.']
  permit_conditions varchar [note: 'Permit conditions']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Official permit or license number assigned by the issuing authority.']
  permit_status varchar
  permit_type varchar [note: 'Category of the environmental permit (e.g., air emissions, wastewater discharge, hazardous waste storage, stormwater).']
  renewal_date date
  renewal_status varchar [note: 'Renewal condition of the permit (e.g., renewed, pending renewal, overdue).']
  reporting_requirements varchar [note: 'Specific reporting obligations tied to the permit (e.g., format, submission deadlines).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the permit record.']

  Note: 'Master record for environmental operating permits and licenses held by Consumer Goods facilities. Captures permit type (air emissions, wastewater discharge, hazardous waste storage, stormwater), issuing regulatory authority (EPA, state/local agency, EU competent authority), permit number, facility reference, permitted activity description, emission or discharge limits, permit issue date, expiry date, renewal status, and ISO 14001 EMS linkage. Serves as the authoritative registry of environmental operating authorizations.'
}

Table sustainability.environmental_incident {
  environmental_incident_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the environmental incident record.']
  capa_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the corrective action plan linked to this incident.']
  distribution_facility_id varchar [note: 'Distribution facility']
  esg_audit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_audit. Business justification: Incidents are often audited; linking to ESG audit captures audit findings related to each incident.']
  manufacturing_facility_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the facility or site where the incident took place.']
  responsible_employee_id varchar [note: 'Responsible employee']
  surveillance_event_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.surveillance_event. Business justification: Environmental incidents must be reported to the regulatory post‑market surveillance system; FK enables incident reporting and follow‑up.']
  city varchar [note: 'City name of the incident location.']
  closure_date date [note: 'Date the incident record was formally closed after remediation.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments from compliance officers regarding the incident.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Result of compliance review against the applicable framework.']
  corrective_action varchar
  corrective_action_taken varchar [note: 'Corrective action taken']
  cost_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the estimated cost.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the incident occurred.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the incident record was created in the system.']
  environmental_impact_assessment varchar [note: 'Summary of the assessed environmental impact (e.g., area affected, ecosystem risk).']
  environmental_incident_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the incident record.']
  estimated_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Projected financial cost to remediate the incident.']
  incident_date date
  incident_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of what happened, including circumstances and immediate impacts.']
  incident_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable reference number assigned to the incident for tracking and reporting.']
  incident_severity varchar [note: 'Incident severity (minor, moderate, major, critical)']
  incident_status varchar [note: 'Incident status (open, under_investigation, closed)']
  incident_subtype varchar [note: 'More detailed classification within the incident type, free‑text for specific description.']
  incident_time timestamp [note: 'Incident time']
  incident_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the incident occurred.']
  incident_type varchar [note: 'Category of the environmental incident (e.g., chemical spill, air emission exceedance).']
  is_regulatory_notification_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the incident must be reported to a regulator (e.g., EPA, OSHA).']
  is_reportable boolean
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  latitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic latitude coordinate of the incident location.']
  location_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of the precise location within the facility (e.g., building, zone, equipment).']
  longitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic longitude coordinate of the incident location.']
  notification_date date [note: 'Date on which the required regulatory notification was submitted.']
  quantity_released decimal(18,4) [note: 'Measured amount of the substance released during the incident.']
  quantity_unit varchar [note: 'Quantity unit']
  regulatory_report_date date [note: 'Regulatory report date']
  regulatory_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Regulatory reporting required flag']
  remediation_end_date date [note: 'Date remediation work was completed.']
  remediation_start_date date [note: 'Date remediation work began.']
  remediation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of remediation activities for the incident.']
  reported_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time the incident was first reported to the organization.']
  reporting_framework varchar [note: 'Regulatory or standards framework used for reporting the incident.']
  resolution_date date
  root_cause_category varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the underlying cause (e.g., equipment failure, human error). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: equipment_failure|human_error|process_gap|external_factor|unknown — promote to reference product]']
  root_cause_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative of the root cause analysis findings.']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Business‑defined severity of the incident based on impact and regulatory risk.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two‑letter state or province abbreviation (U.S. format).']
  substance_code varchar [note: 'Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) registry number identifying the substance.']
  substance_involved varchar [note: 'Substance involved']
  substance_name varchar [note: 'Common name of the chemical or material released.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit used for the quantity released.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the incident record.']
  zip_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code of the incident location.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of environmental incidents, spills, exceedances, and near-misses at Consumer Goods facilities or in the supply chain. Captures incident date and time, facility or location reference, incident type (chemical spill, air emission exceedance, wastewater discharge violation, soil contamination), severity classification, quantity and substance released, regulatory notification requirement flag, notification date, corrective action plan reference, root cause category, and closure date. Supports EPA/OSHA regulatory reporting and ISO 14001 nonconformance management.'
}

Table sustainability.esg_disclosure {
  esg_disclosure_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each ESG disclosure record.']
  esg_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_commitment. Business justification: Disclosures report on ESG commitments; linking enables traceability from disclosure to the underlying commitment.']
  materiality_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the materiality assessment that underpins the disclosed metrics.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date the ESG disclosure was approved for submission.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the internal stakeholder who approved the ESG disclosure for submission.']
  assurance_level varchar [note: 'Level of external assurance applied to the ESG disclosure.']
  assurance_provider varchar [note: 'Name of the third‑party assurance firm providing verification.']
  carbon_emissions_scope1 decimal(15,3) [note: 'Direct (Scope 1) greenhouse gas emissions, measured in metric tonnes CO₂e.']
  carbon_emissions_scope2 decimal(15,3) [note: 'Indirect (Scope 2) greenhouse gas emissions from purchased electricity, measured in metric tonnes CO₂e.']
  carbon_emissions_scope3 decimal(15,3) [note: 'Other indirect (Scope 3) greenhouse gas emissions across the value chain, measured in metric tonnes CO₂e.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the ESG disclosure record was first created in the system.']
  disclosure_framework varchar
  disclosure_narrative varchar [note: 'Disclosure narrative']
  disclosure_period varchar
  disclosure_reference varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the ESG disclosure submission (e.g., internal tracking number).']
  disclosure_status varchar
  disclosure_topic varchar [note: 'Disclosure topic (climate, water, waste, human_rights, governance)']
  disclosure_type varchar [note: 'Disclosure type (annual_report, sustainability_report, cdp_response)']
  document_url varchar [note: 'Document URL']
  energy_consumption decimal(15,3) [note: 'Total energy consumed, measured in megawatt‑hours (MWh).']
  esg_disclosure_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the ESG disclosure.']
  external_assurance_flag boolean [note: 'External assurance flag']
  framework varchar [note: 'Framework used for the ESG disclosure (e.g., GRI, CDP, TCFD, SASB, EU CSRD, SEC Climate Rule, UN SDG). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: GRI|CDP|TCFD|SASB|EU_CS_RD|SEC_Climate|UN_SDG — promote to reference product]']
  fsc_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the disclosed products are certified by the Forest Stewardship Council.']
  is_assured boolean
  iso_14001_compliance boolean [note: 'Flag indicating compliance with ISO 14001 environmental management standards.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  metric_name varchar [note: 'Metric name']
  metric_unit varchar [note: 'Metric unit']
  metric_value decimal(18,4) [note: 'Metric value']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the ESG disclosure.']
  packaging_recyclability_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of packaging material that is recyclable or made from recycled content.']
  public_url varchar [note: 'Web address where the published ESG disclosure can be accessed.']
  publication_date date [note: 'Publication date']
  published_date date
  renewable_energy_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Share of total energy consumption sourced from renewable resources, expressed as a percent.']
  reporting_framework varchar [note: 'Reporting framework (GRI, SASB, TCFD, CDP, DJSI)']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'End date of the ESG reporting period.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Start date of the ESG reporting period.']
  reporting_quarter varchar [note: 'Quarter of the reporting year covered by the ESG disclosure.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year of the ESG reporting period.']
  rspo_certified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the disclosed products meet Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil certification.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the ESG disclosure was submitted to the external framework or regulator.']
  total_carbon_emissions decimal(15,3) [note: 'Aggregated total carbon emissions (Scope 1 + Scope 2 + Scope 3) for the reporting period.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the ESG disclosure record.']
  waste_generated decimal(15,3) [note: 'Total waste produced, measured in metric tonnes.']
  water_consumption decimal(15,3) [note: 'Total water used in operations during the reporting period, measured in cubic meters.']

  Note: 'Master record for formal ESG disclosure submissions made to external frameworks, regulators, and investors. Captures disclosure framework (GRI, CDP, TCFD, SASB, EU CSRD, SEC Climate Rule, UN SDG), reporting period, submission date, disclosure status (draft, submitted, published), reported metrics summary (carbon emissions, water, waste, social indicators), assurance level (limited, reasonable, none), assurance provider, public URL, and materiality assessment reference. SSOT for all external ESG reporting obligations.'
}

Table sustainability.circular_initiative {
  circular_initiative_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the circular initiative.']

  compliance_rspo_certified boolean [note: 'True if the initiative meets Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil (RSPO) certification requirements.']

  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Last updated timestamp']
  launch_date date [note: 'Date the initiative was launched or became operational.']
  lifecycle_stage varchar [note: 'Current stage of the initiative within its lifecycle.']
  material_diverted_tonnes decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total tonnes of material diverted from landfill or virgin feedstock.']
  material_recovered_kg decimal(18,4) [note: 'Material recovered (kg)']
  material_recovered_tonnes decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total tonnes of material recovered through the initiative.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or remarks about the initiative.']
  partner_organizations varchar [note: 'List of external partners (e.g., recyclers, NGOs) involved in the initiative.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'Product category']
  program_type varchar [note: 'Category of circular initiative (e.g., take‑back program, refillable packaging).']
  progress_status varchar [note: 'Current progress indicator against defined KPIs.']
  record_source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source operational system (e.g., SAP S/4HANA, Oracle ERP) that supplied the record.']
  recycling_rate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Recycling rate percentage']
  reporting_framework varchar [note: 'External sustainability reporting framework used for disclosure.']
  stakeholder_group varchar [note: 'Primary stakeholder group(s) impacted by the initiative (e.g., consumers, suppliers).']
  start_date date
  target_end_date date [note: 'Planned end or sunset date for the initiative.']
  target_material varchar [note: 'Primary material or product category the initiative aims to address.']
  target_material_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target percentage of product composition that must be recycled or contain recycled content.']
  target_metric varchar
  target_value decimal(18,4)
  units_collected varchar [note: 'Units collected']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the initiative record.']
  verification_method varchar [note: 'Method used to verify the initiative\'s reported metrics (e.g., third‑party audit, internal review).']
  waste_reduction_tonnes decimal(12,3) [note: 'Tonnes of waste reduced or avoided through the program.']
  water_savings_cubic_meters decimal(12,3) [note: 'Volume of water saved (in cubic meters) attributable to the initiative.']

  Note: 'Master record for circular economy programs managed by Consumer Goods. Captures initiative name, type (take-back program, refillable packaging, PCR content increase, packaging elimination, product-as-a-service, industrial symbiosis), target material or product category, launch date, target end date, geographic scope, material recovered/diverted in tonnes, partner organizations, investment amount, consumer participation rate, and progress status against circular economy KPIs. Supports Ellen MacArthur Foundation reporting and public sustainability communications.'
}

Table sustainability.supplier_esg_eval {

  energy_consumption_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Score reflecting the supplier\'s energy efficiency and renewable energy usage.']
  environmental_score decimal(6,2) [note: 'Score for the environmental pillar of the ESG assessment.']
  epa_reportable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the supplier\'s activities are subject to EPA reporting requirements.']
  esg_rating varchar [note: 'ESG rating (A, B, C, D, F)']

  evaluation_type varchar [note: 'Evaluation type (self_assessment, audit, third_party_rating)']
